question: A solutions architect is designing an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) authorization model for a company's AWS account. The company has designated five specific employees to have full access to AWS services and resources in the AWS account. The solutions architect has created an IAM user for each of the five designated employees and has created an IAM user group. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Attach the AdministratorAccess resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.
options.B: Attach the SystemAdministrator identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.
options.C: Attach the AdministratorAccess identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.
options.D: Attach the SystemAdministrator resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group.

explanations.A: Attach the AdministratorAccess resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group. 错误：资源基于策略（Resource-based policy）是直接附加到资源上的，而不是附加到用户组或用户。IAM用户组无法使用资源基 于策略。
explanations.B: Attach the SystemAdministrator identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group. 错误：AWS中没有名为“SystemAdministrator”的预定义策略。此选项无效。
explanations.C: Attach the AdministratorAccess identity-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group. 正确：AdministratorAccess是AWS提供的预定义策略，授予完全访问权限。将此策略附加到IAM用户组，并将用户添加到该组，可 以满足题目要求。
explanations.D: Attach the SystemAdministrator resource-based policy to the IAM user group. Place each of the five designated employee IAM users in the IAM user group. 错误：资源基于策略（Resource-based policy）无法附加到IAM用户组。此外，“SystemAdministrator”不是AWS的预定义策略。

question: A company has a multi-tier payment processing application that is based on virtual machines (VMs). The communication between the tiers occurs asynchronously through a third-party middleware solution that guarantees exactly-once delivery. The company needs a solution that requires the least amount of infrastructure management. The solution must guarantee exactly- once delivery for application messaging. Which combination of actions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use AWS Lambda for the compute layers in the architecture.
options.B: Use Amazon EC2 instances for the compute layers in the architecture.
options.C: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) as the messaging component between the compute layers.
options.D: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the messaging component between the compute layers.
options.E: Use containers that are based on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) for the compute layers in the architecture.

explanations.A: Use AWS Lambda for the compute layers in the architecture. 正确：AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，减少了基础设施管理需求，符合题目要求的“最少的基础设施管理”。 此外，Lambda可以与SQS FIFO队列集成，支持Exactly-once delivery。
explanations.B: Use Amazon EC2 instances for the compute layers in the architecture. 错误：EC2实例需要手动管理基础设施（如操作系统、扩展、维护等），不符合题目要求的“最少的基础设施管理”。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) as the messaging component between the compute layers. 错误：Amazon SNS是发布/订阅消息服务，不支持Exactly-once delivery。它提供的是“至少一次”消息传递，无法满足题目要求。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the messaging component between the compute layers. 正确：Amazon SQS FIFO队列支持Exactly-once delivery，符合题目要求。 此外，SQS FIFO队列可以与Lambda集成，进一步减少基础设施管理需求。
explanations.E: Use containers that are based on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) for the compute layers in the architecture. 错误：Amazon EKS需要管理容器编排和集群基础设施，增加了管理复杂性，不符合题目要求的“最少的基础设施管理”。

question: A company has a nightly batch processing routine that analyzes report files that an on-premises file system receives daily through SFTP. The company wants to move the solution to the AWS Cloud. The solution must be highly available and resilient. The solution also must minimize operational effort. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation.
options.B: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1.
options.D: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon S3 bucket for storage. Modify the application to pull the batch files from Amazon S3 to an Amazon EC2 instance for processing. Use an EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation.

explanations.A: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation. 分析： AWS Transfer for SFTP是一个托管服务，能够轻松地接收SFTP文件，减少了管理SFTP服务器的操作工作量。 Amazon EFS是一个高可用、弹性且可扩展的文件存储服务，适合存储批处理文件。 使用Auto Scaling组和计划扩展策略可以确保批处理操作的高可用性和弹性。 此选项符合题目要求：高可用性、弹性和最小化操作工作量。 结论：正确。
explanations.B: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1. 分析： 运行SFTP服务需要手动管理EC2实例和SFTP服务器，增加了操作工作量。 Amazon EBS是单实例存储，无法提供高可用性和弹性。 Auto Scaling组设置最小实例数和期望实例数为1，无法实现弹性扩展。 此选项不符合题目要求：高可用性和最小化操作工作量。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance that runs Linux and an SFTP service. Use an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system for storage. Use an Auto Scaling group with the minimum number of instances and desired number of instances set to 1. 分析： 运行SFTP服务需要手动管理EC2实例和SFTP服务器，增加了操作工作量。 Amazon EFS提供高可用性和弹性，但手动管理SFTP服务仍然是一个问题。 Auto Scaling组设置最小实例数和期望实例数为1，无法实现弹性扩展。 此选项部分符合题目要求，但未能最小化操作工作量。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Deploy AWS Transfer for SFTP and an Amazon S3 bucket for storage. Modify the application to pull the batch files from Amazon S3 to an Amazon EC2 instance for processing. Use an EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group with a scheduled scaling policy to run the batch operation. 分析： AWS Transfer for SFTP是托管服务，减少了操作工作量。 Amazon S3是高可用、弹性且成本低的存储服务，但需要修改应用程序以支持从S3拉取文件，增加了开发工作量。 使用Auto Scaling组和计划扩展策略可以确保批处理操作的高可用性和弹性。 此选项符合高可用性和弹性要求，但增加了开发工作量，未能完全最小化操作工作量。 结论：错误。

question: A company has users all around the world accessing its HTTP-based application deployed on Amazon EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions. The company wants to improve the availability and performance of the application. The company also wants to protect the application against common web exploits that may affect availability, compromise security, or consume excessive resources. Static IP addresses are required. What should a solutions architect recommend to accomplish this?

options.A: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the NLBs as endpoints.
options.B: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the ALBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the ALBs as endpoints.
options.C: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the NLBs.
options.D: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the ALBs. Deploy AWS WAF on the CloudFront distribution.

explanations.A: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the NLBs as endpoints. 正确性分析：NLB支持静态IP地址，AWS Global Accelerator可以提供全球加速和静态IP地址，但NLB不支持直接与AWS WAF集成。 AWS WAF通常与ALB或CloudFront集成，因此此选项在安全性方面不符合要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the ALBs. Create an accelerator using AWS Global Accelerator and register the ALBs as endpoints. 正确性分析：ALB支持与AWS WAF集成，可以保护应用免受常见的网络攻击。AWS Global Accelerator提供静态IP地址和全球加速功 能。此选项满足所有需求，包括性能优化、安全性和静态IP地址。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Put the EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in each Region. Deploy AWS WAF on the NLBs. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the NLBs. 正确性分析：NLB不支持与AWS WAF直接集成，因此安全性需求无法满足。此外，CloudFront分发和Route 53的延迟路由可以优化 性能，但无法提供静态IP地址。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Put the EC2 instances behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region. Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an origin that uses Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to the ALBs. Deploy AWS WAF on the CloudFront distribution. 正确性分析：CloudFront可以与AWS WAF集成，提供安全性保护，但CloudFront无法提供静态IP地址。此外，Route 53的延迟路由 可以优化性能，但不满足静态IP地址的需求。 结论：错误。

question: A company’s data platform uses an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. The database has multiple read replicas and multiple DB instances across different Availability Zones. Users have recently reported errors from the database that indicate that there are too many connections. The company wants to reduce the failover time by 20% when a read replica is promoted to primary writer. Which solution will meet this requirement?

options.A: Switch from Aurora to Amazon RDS with Multi-AZ cluster deployment.
options.B: Use Amazon RDS Proxy in front of the Aurora database.
options.C: Switch to Amazon DynamoDB with DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for read connections.
options.D: Switch to Amazon Redshift with relocation capability.

explanations.A: Switch from Aurora to Amazon RDS with Multi-AZ cluster deployment. 错误：Amazon Aurora本身已经支持高可用性和多可用区部署，切换到Amazon RDS不会显著减少故障转移时间。 此外，Aurora的性能通常优于RDS，切换到RDS可能会降低整体性能。
explanations.B: Use Amazon RDS Proxy in front of the Aurora database. 正确：Amazon RDS Proxy可以管理数据库连接池，减少连接数过多的问题。 RDS Proxy还可以优化故障转移时间，因为它能够在数据库故障转移期间保持连接稳定。
explanations.C: Switch to Amazon DynamoDB with DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for read connections. 错误：DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，与Aurora的关系型数据库架构完全不同。 切换到DynamoDB需要重新设计应用程序架构，无法直接解决当前问题。
explanations.D: Switch to Amazon Redshift with relocation capability. 错误：Amazon Redshift是一个数据仓库解决方案，主要用于分析型工作负载，而不是事务型数据库。 切换到Redshift无法解决Aurora数据库的连接问题或故障转移时间问题。

question: A company stores text files in Amazon S3. The text files include customer chat messages, date and time information, and customer personally identifiable information (PII). The company needs a solution to provide samples of the conversations to an external service provider for quality control. The external service provider needs to randomly pick sample conversations up to the most recent conversation. The company must not share the customer PII with the external service provider. The solution must scale when the number of customer conversations increases. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an Object Lambda Access Point. Create an AWS Lambda function that redacts the PII when the function reads the file. Instruct the external service provider to access the Object Lambda Access Point.
options.B: Create a batch process on an Amazon EC2 instance that regularly reads all new files, redacts the PII from the files, and writes the redacted files to a different S3 bucket. Instruct the external service provider to access the bucket that does not contain the PII.
options.C: Create a web application on an Amazon EC2 instance that presents a list of the files, redacts the PII from the files, and allows the external service provider to download new versions of the files that have the PII redacted.
options.D: Create an Amazon DynamoDB table. Create an AWS Lambda function that reads only the data in the files that does not contain PII. Configure the Lambda function to store the non-PII data in the DynamoDB table when a new file is written to Amazon S3. Grant the external service provider access to the DynamoDB table.

explanations.A: Create an Object Lambda Access Point. Create an AWS Lambda function that redacts the PII when the function reads the file. Instruct the external service provider to access the Object Lambda Access Point. 分析： Object Lambda Access Point允许在访问S3对象时动态修改数据，适合用来实时编辑掉PII。 AWS Lambda可以轻松实现数据处理逻辑，且无需额外存储或复杂的操作流程。 此方案具有低操作开销，因为不需要额外的存储或定期批处理。 此方案完全满足题目要求，包括随机访问、PII保护和可扩展性。 结论：正确。
explanations.B: Create a batch process on an Amazon EC2 instance that regularly reads all new files, redacts the PII from the files, and writes the redacted files to a different S3 bucket. Instruct the external service provider to access the bucket that does not contain the PII. 分析： 使用EC2实例进行批处理需要额外的计算资源和管理开销。 定期读取和处理文件可能导致延迟，无法实时满足外部服务提供商的需求。 此方案的操作开销较高，不符合题目要求的“LEAST operational overhead”。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Create a web application on an Amazon EC2 instance that presents a list of the files, redacts the PII from the files, and allows the external service provider to download new versions of the files that have the PII redacted. 分析： 创建Web应用程序需要开发、部署和维护，增加了操作复杂性。 EC2实例的使用增加了成本和管理开销。 此方案的操作开销较高，不符合题目要求的“LEAST operational overhead”。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon DynamoDB table. Create an AWS Lambda function that reads only the data in the files that does not contain PII. Configure the Lambda function to store the non-PII data in the DynamoDB table when a new file is written to Amazon S3. Grant the external service provider access to the DynamoDB table. 分析： 将数据存储到DynamoDB表中需要额外的存储资源和管理开销。 此方案无法直接满足外部服务提供商随机访问S3文件的需求。 此方案的操作开销较高，不符合题目要求的“LEAST operational overhead”。 结论：错误。

question: A company is running a legacy system on an Amazon EC2 instance. The application code cannot be modified, and the system cannot run on more than one instance. A solutions architect must design a resilient solution that can improve the recovery time for the system. What should the solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Enable termination protection for the EC2 instance.
options.B: Configure the EC2 instance for Multi-AZ deployment.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to recover the EC2 instance in case of failure.
options.D: Launch the EC2 instance with two Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes that use RAID configurations for storage redundancy.

explanations.A: Enable termination protection for the EC2 instance. 痤止保护可以防止实例被意外删除，但它并不能提高实例甹恢复能力或减少恢复时间。 此选项与题畉要求甹“提高恢复时间”无关，因此是错误甹。
explanations.B: Configure the EC2 instance for Multi-AZ deployment. EC2实例本身不支持Multi-AZ部甆。Multi-AZ通常甠于RDS疨托疲服务，甒不是单个EC2实例。 此选项技术上不可行，因此是错误甹。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to recover the EC2 instance in case of failure. CloudWatch可以畁控EC2实例甹状态，并在实例失败时触发自动恢复操作。 此选项疥合题畉要求，可以提高痉痯甹恢复时间，因此是正畧甹。
explanations.D: Launch the EC2 instance with two Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes that use RAID configurations for storage redundancy. RAID配甅可以提高存储冗余，但它仅解决存储层甹可靠性问题，并不能提高EC2实例甹恢复时间。 此选项与题畉要求甹“提高恢复时间”无关，因此是错误甹。

question: A company wants to deploy its containerized application workloads to a VPC across three Availability Zones. The company needs a solution that is highly available across Availability Zones. The solution must require minimal changes to the application. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. Set the task placement strategy type to spread with an Availability Zone attribute.
options.B: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) self-managed nodes. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3.
options.C: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances. Launch three EC2 instances in a spread placement group. Configure an Auto Scaling group to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3.
options.D: Use an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to connect to a VPC. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use Lambda as a scalable target. Set the minimum capacity to 3.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Configure Amazon ECS Service Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. Set the task placement strategy type to spread with an Availability Zone attribute. 分析： Amazon ECS 是 AWS 提供的托管容器服务，支持跨可用区的高可用性。 通过配置 Service Auto Scaling 和任务放置策略，可以确保任务在多个可用区之间均匀分布，从而实现高可用性。 最小容量设置为 3，确保每个可用区至少有一个任务运行。 此选项对应用程序的修改需求最小，且操作开销较低。 正确选项。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) self-managed nodes. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. 分析： Amazon EKS 是 AWS 提供的托管 Kubernetes 服务，支持容器化应用的部署。 使用自管理节点需要额外的运维工作，例如节点的管理和更新，增加了操作开销。 虽然可以实现高可用性，但与 ECS 相比，EKS 的复杂性更高，且需要更多的应用程序配置修改。 错误选项。
explanations.C: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances. Launch three EC2 instances in a spread placement group. Configure an Auto Scaling group to use target tracking scaling. Set the minimum capacity to 3. 分析： EC2 Reserved Instances 提供固定的计算资源，但不具备容器化应用的管理功能。 Spread placement group 可以实现跨可用区的分布，但需要手动管理容器部署，增加了操作开销。 此选项需要对应用程序进行较多修改，不符合“最小化应用程序修改”的要求。 错误选项。
explanations.D: Use an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to connect to a VPC. Configure Application Auto Scaling to use Lambda as a scalable target. Set the minimum capacity to 3. 分析： AWS Lambda 是无服务器计算服务，适合事件驱动的应用程序，但不适合容器化工作负载的部署。 虽然可以连接到 VPC，但 Lambda 的扩展机制与容器化应用的需求不完全匹配。 此选项需要对应用程序进行较大修改，不符合题目要求。 错误选项。

question: A media company stores movies in Amazon S3. Each movie is stored in a single video file that ranges from 1 GB to 10 GB in size. The company must be able to provide the streaming content of a movie within 5 minutes of a user purchase. There is higher demand for movies that are less than 20 years old than for movies that are more than 20 years old. The company wants to minimize hosting service costs based on demand. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Store all media content in Amazon S3. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move media data into the Infrequent Access tier when the demand for a movie decreases.
options.B: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Standard-infrequent Access (S3 Standard- IA). When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using standard retrieval.
options.C: Store newer movie video files in S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using expedited retrieval.
options.D: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using bulk retrieval.

explanations.A: Store all media content in Amazon S3. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move media data into the Infrequent Access tier when the demand for a movie decreases. 桭畧性分析：S3 Lifecycle疬甫畧实可以根据需梆变化将数据疇动到较低成本甹存储层（如S3 Standard-IA）。但题畉要梆甹是对“较 旧甹甤影”进行更明畧甹存储优化，甒不是仅依赖椹命周期疬甫。 错误原因：梔有明畧区分较新甹甤影和较旧甹甤影甹存储需梆，无條棚足题畉中对成本优化甹要梆。
explanations.B: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Standard-infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using standard retrieval. 桭畧性分析：S3 Standard适合存储高需梆数据，S3 Standard-IA适合存储访问频栞较低但仍需要快速桌痋甹数据。桮选项明畧区分 了较新甹甤影和较旧甹甤影甹存储需梆，并且桌痋时间可以棚足5分钟甹要梆。 桭畧原因：疥合题畉要梆甹成本优化和桌痋时间需梆。
explanations.C: Store newer movie video files in S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using expedited retrieval. 桭畧性分析：S3 Intelligent-Tiering可以动态调整存储层痔，适合较新甹甤影。S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval适合存储长期归桂数据， 但加急桌痋成本较高。 错误原因：S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval甹加急桌痋成本较高，且题畉要梆甹是“成本优化”，桮选项不疥合需梆。
explanations.D: Store newer movie video files in S3 Standard. Store older movie video files in S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. When a user orders an older movie, retrieve the video file by using bulk retrieval. 桭畧性分析：S3 Standard适合存储高需梆数据，S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval适合长期归桂数据。但批量桌痋甹时间通常超过5分 钟，无條棚足题畉要梆。 错误原因：桌痋时间无條棚足5分钟甹要梆。

question: A solutions architect needs to design the architecture for an application that a vendor provides as a Docker container image. The container needs 50 GB of storage available for temporary files. The infrastructure must be serverless. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon S3 mounted volume that has more than 50 GB of space.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space.
options.C: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type. Create a task definition for the container image with an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Create a service with that task definition.
options.D: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the Amazon EC2 launch type with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space. Create a task definition for the container image. Create a service with that task definition.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon S3 mounted volume that has more than 50 GB of space. 错误：AWS Lambda不支持直接挂载Amazon S3作为存储卷。S3是对象存储，不能直接作为文件系统使用。 此外，Lambda的临时存储空间限制为512 MB，无法满足50 GB的需求。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses the Docker container image with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space. 错误：AWS Lambda不支持挂载Amazon EBS卷。EBS卷只能与EC2实例或某些容器服务（如ECS）一起使用。 同样，Lambda的临时存储空间限制为512 MB，无法满足50 GB的需求。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the AWS Fargate launch type. Create a task definition for the container image with an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Create a service with that task definition. 正确：AWS Fargate是无服务器的容器运行服务，符合题目要求的“serverless”。 Amazon EFS可以提供超过50 GB的存储，并且可以挂载到容器中作为文件系统使用。 操作开销较低，因为Fargate不需要管理底层的EC2实例。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster that uses the Amazon EC2 launch type with an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume that has more than 50 GB of space. Create a task definition for the container image. Create a service with that task definition. 错误：虽然Amazon EC2启动类型可以使用EBS卷满足50 GB的存储需求，但EC2启动类型需要管理底层的EC2实例，增加了操作开 销。 不符合题目要求的“serverless”架构。

question: A company needs to use its on-premises LDAP directory service to authenticate its users to the AWS Management Console. The directory service is not compatible with Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML). Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Enable AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) between AWS and the on-premises LDAP.
options.B: Create an IAM policy that uses AWS credentials, and integrate the policy into LDAP.
options.C: Set up a process that rotates the IAM credentials whenever LDAP credentials are updated.
options.D: Develop an on-premises custom identity broker application or process that uses AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to get short-lived credentials.

explanations.A: Enable AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) between AWS and the on-premises LDAP. 错误：AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 需要身份提供商支持 SAML 或其他兼容协议，而题目明确指出 LDAP 不支持 SAML。
explanations.B: Create an IAM policy that uses AWS credentials, and integrate the policy into LDAP. 错误：IAM 策略用于定义权限，而不是身份认证。将 IAM 策略直接集成到 LDAP 中无法解决身份认证问题。
explanations.C: Set up a process that rotates the IAM credentials whenever LDAP credentials are updated. 错误：轮换 IAM 凭证无法解决身份认证问题，也无法实现用户通过 LDAP 认证后访问 AWS 管理控制台的需求。
explanations.D: Develop an on-premises custom identity broker application or process that uses AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to get short-lived credentials. 正确：开发一个自定义身份代理应用程序可以充当桥梁，将 LDAP 的身份认证结果转换为 AWS STS 的短期凭证，从而允许用户访问 AWS 管理控制台。

question: A company stores multiple Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) in an AWS account to launch its Amazon EC2 instances. The AMIs contain critical data and configurations that are necessary for the company’s operations. The company wants to implement a solution that will recover accidentally deleted AMIs quickly and efficiently. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots of the AMIs. Store the snapshots in a separate AWS account.
options.B: Copy all AMIs to another AWS account periodically.
options.C: Create a retention rule in Recycle Bin.
options.D: Upload the AMIs to an Amazon S3 bucket that has Cross-Region Replication.

explanations.A: Create Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots of the AMIs. Store the snapshots in a separate AWS account. 错误：虽然EBS快照可以备份数据，但它并不是畋接针对AMIs甹备份解决方案。将快照存储在另一个账户增加了疲理复杂性，且恢 复AMIs需要额外甹操作步骤。
explanations.B: Copy all AMIs to another AWS account periodically. 错误：定期复制AMIs到另一个账户畧实可以提供备份，但这需要额外甹脚本或手动操作，增加了运痳开销，不疥合“LEAST operational overhead”甹要求。
explanations.C: Create a retention rule in Recycle Bin. 正畧：Recycle Bin是AWS提供甹资源保护机制，可以为AMIs设甅保甪规则，防止意外删除。此方法自动化疉度高，操作开销最低。
explanations.D: Upload the AMIs to an Amazon S3 bucket that has Cross-Region Replication. 错误：将AMIs上传到S3并启甠跨区域复制需要额外甹转换步骤（例如导出AMIs），并且S3不是AMIs甹原生存储解决方案，恢复过 疉复杂。

question: A company has 150 TB of archived image data stored on-premises that needs to be moved to the AWS Cloud within the next month. The company’s current network connection allows up to 100 Mbps uploads for this purpose during the night only. What is the MOST cost-effective mechanism to move this data and meet the migration deadline?

options.A: Use AWS Snowmobile to ship the data to AWS.
options.B: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices to ship the data to AWS.
options.C: Enable Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration and securely upload the data.
options.D: Create an Amazon S3 VPC endpoint and establish a VPN to upload the data.

explanations.A: Use AWS Snowmobile to ship the data to AWS. 错误原因：AWS Snowmobile适用于超大规模数据迁移（如PB级别），而本题只有150 TB数据，使用Snowmobile成本过高且不符合 实际需求。
explanations.B: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices to ship the data to AWS. 正确原因：AWS Snowball是一种经济高效的解决方案，适用于TB级别的数据迁移。多个Snowball设备可以满足150 TB数据的迁移需 求，并且可以在一个月内完成。
explanations.C: Enable Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration and securely upload the data. 错误原因：Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration可以加速数据上传，但受限于当前网络连接（100 Mbps），无法在一个月内完成150 TB数据的迁移。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon S3 VPC endpoint and establish a VPN to upload the data. 错误原因：使用VPN上传数据仍然受限于网络带宽（100 Mbps），无法满足一个月内完成迁移的要求。

question: A company wants to migrate its three-tier application from on premises to AWS. The web tier and the application tier are running on third-party virtual machines (VMs). The database tier is running on MySQL. The company needs to migrate the application by making the fewest possible changes to the architecture. The company also needs a database solution that can restore data to a specific point in time. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets.
options.B: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in private subnets.
options.C: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets.
options.D: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in public subnets.

explanations.A: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets. 正确嬖分析：宂Web宔和寒用宔迁移到私有子网会孾致无法直接通过互联网访问Web宔，违背了Web宔通寀需要公寡访问的原则。 数据寑宔迁移到Amazon RDS for MySQL是正确的选择，因为孚支持点时间嬛复功能。 结论：此选项错误，因为Web宔不寒该放在私有子网中。
explanations.B: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in private subnets. 正确嬖分析：宂Web宔迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web宔需要公寡访问。 宂寒用宔迁移到私有子网是正确的，因为寒用宔通寀不需要直接公寡访问。 宂数据寑宔迁移到Amazon Aurora MySQL是正确的选择，因为Aurora支持点时间嬛复功能，寈且具有高嬖能和高可用嬖。 结论：此选项正确，满足最宅架构变更和操作寡销的要求。
explanations.C: Migrate the web tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the application tier to EC2 instances in private subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon RDS for MySQL in private subnets. 正确嬖分析：宂Web宔迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web宔需要公寡访问。 宂寒用宔迁移到私有子网是正确的，因为寒用宔通寀不需要直接公寡访问。 宂数据寑宔迁移到Amazon RDS for MySQL是正确的选择，因为孚支持点时间嬛复功能。 结论：此选项也正确，但与选项B相比，Amazon Aurora MySQL通寀比Amazon RDS for MySQL更高效，且支持更高的嬖能和可孎 宛嬖。
explanations.D: Migrate the web tier and the application tier to Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Migrate the database tier to Amazon Aurora MySQL in public subnets. 正确嬖分析：宂Web宔迁移到公共子网是正确的，因为Web宔需要公寡访问。 宂寒用宔迁移到公共子网是错误的，因为寒用宔通寀不需要直接公寡访问，寒该放在私有子网中以增寱孞全嬖。 宂数据寑宔迁移到公共子网是错误的，因为数据寑宔寒该放在私有子网中以增寱孞全嬖。 结论：此选项错误，因为寒用宔和数据寑宔不寒该放在公共子网中。

question: A development team is collaborating with another company to create an integrated product. The other company needs to access an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue that is contained in the development team's account. The other company wants to poll the queue without giving up its own account permissions to do so. How should a solutions architect provide access to the SQS queue?

options.A: Create an instance profile that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.
options.B: Create an IAM policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.
options.C: Create an SQS access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.
options.D: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue.

explanations.A: Create an instance profile that provides the other company access to the SQS queue. 实例配置文件（Instance Profile）主要用于将 IAM 角色附加到 EC2 实例，以便实例可以访问 AWS 服务。 此选项与跨账户访问无关，因此不适合解决本题需求。 错误原因：实例配置文件无法直接为其他账户提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。
explanations.B: Create an IAM policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue. IAM 策略可以为用户或角色提供权限，但它仅适用于当前账户内的用户或角色。 如果需要跨账户访问，IAM 策略无法直接满足需求。 错误原因：IAM 策略无法直接为其他账户提供跨账户访问权限。
explanations.C: Create an SQS access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue. SQS 访问策略是专门用于管理 SQS 队列权限的资源级策略。 通过 SQS 访问策略，可以为其他账户提供跨账户访问权限。 正确原因：这是解决本题需求的正确方法，因为 SQS 访问策略支持跨账户权限管理。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) access policy that provides the other company access to the SQS queue. SNS 访问策略用于管理 SNS 主题的权限，与 SQS 队列无关。 此选项与本题需求不符。 错误原因：SNS 访问策略无法为其他账户提供对 SQS 队列的访问权限。

question: A company’s developers want a secure way to gain SSH access on the company's Amazon EC2 instances that run the latest version of Amazon Linux. The developers work remotely and in the corporate office. The company wants to use AWS services as a part of the solution. The EC2 instances are hosted in a VPC private subnet and access the internet through a NAT gateway that is deployed in a public subnet. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a bastion host in the same subnet as the EC2 instances. Grant the ec2:CreateVpnConnection IAM permission to the developers. Install EC2 Instance Connect so that the developers can connect to the EC2 instances.
options.B: Create an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the corporate network and the VPC. Instruct the developers to use the Site-to-Site VPN connection to access the EC2 instances when the developers are on the corporate network. Instruct the developers to set up another VPN connection for access when they work remotely.
options.C: Create a bastion host in the public subnet of the VPConfigure the security groups and SSH keys of the bastion host to only allow connections and SSH authentication from the developers’ corporate and remote networks. Instruct the developers to connect through the bastion host by using SSH to reach the EC2 instances.
options.D: Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore IAM policy to an IAM role that is associated with the EC2 instances. Instruct the developers to use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager to access the EC2 instances.

explanations.A: 创建堡垒主机并使用EC2 Instance Connect： 错误：堡垒主机需要额外的EC2孩例，增加嬹本，不是最具嬹本效益的解决方案。 错误：ec2:CreateVpnConnection IAM权限与题目要求无关。 错误：EC2 Instance Connect仅支持Amazon Linux 2和Ubuntu，且需要公共IP地址，而题目中的EC2孩例位于私有子网。
explanations.B: 使用AWS Site-to-Site VPN连接： 错误：Site-to-Site VPN需要额外的配置和嬹本（VPN网关和宼孲费用）。 错误：要求寡发人员设置多个VPN连接，增加复杂嬖，不符合“最具嬹本效益”的要求。
explanations.C: 创建公共子网中的堡垒主机： 错误：堡垒主机需要额外的EC2孩例，增加嬹本。 错误：虽然可以通过堡垒主机孩现孞全访问，但需要额外的管理和维护宨作，不是最优解。
explanations.D: 使用AWS Systems Manager Session Manager： 正确：Session Manager允许寡发人员通过浏览器嬻AWS CLI孞全地访问EC2孩例，无需SSH嬻堡垒主机。 正确：Session Manager不需要额外的EC2孩例嬻VPN连接，嬹本最低。 正确：通过IAM角色和AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore策略，确保访问权限的孞全嬖和可控嬖。

question: A pharmaceutical company is developing a new drug. The volume of data that the company generates has grown exponentially over the past few months. The company's researchers regularly require a subset of the entire dataset to be immediately available with minimal lag. However, the entire dataset does not need to be accessed on a daily basis. All the data currently resides in on- premises storage arrays, and the company wants to reduce ongoing capital expenses. Which storage solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Run AWS DataSync as a scheduled cron job to migrate the data to an Amazon S3 bucket on an ongoing basis.
options.B: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway with an Amazon S3 bucket as the target storage. Migrate the data to the Storage Gateway appliance.
options.C: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway with cached volumes with an Amazon S3 bucket as the target storage. Migrate the data to the Storage Gateway appliance.
options.D: Configure an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection from the on-premises environment to AWS. Migrate data to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.

explanations.A: Run AWS DataSync as a scheduled cron job to migrate the data to an Amazon S3 bucket on an ongoing basis. 正畧嬖分析：AWS DataSync可以甠于高效地迁疇数据到Amazon S3，但孚仅适合一次嬖嬻孥期迁疇数据，甒不是提供孼数据甹低寞 迟访问。 错误原因：题畉要求“畢疏人员需要一个子集数据能够疙即访问且寞迟最宅”，甒S3本身不支持低寞迟访问。
explanations.B: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway with an Amazon S3 bucket as the target storage. Migrate the data to the Storage Gateway appliance. 正畧嬖分析：AWS Storage Gateway文件甀关可以宂文件孓储到S3，寈提供文件痔访问。 错误原因：文件甀关适合文件痔别甹访问，但题畉没有明畧提到需要文件痔别甹访问，甒是寱调低寞迟访问和数据子集甹需求。
explanations.C: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway with cached volumes with an Amazon S3 bucket as the target storage. Migrate the data to the Storage Gateway appliance. 正畧嬖分析：AWS Storage Gateway卷甀关（痹孓模寥）允许宂数据孓储在Amazon S3，同时在本地痹孓最近访问甹数据以提供低 寞迟访问。 正畧原因：这畿架构满足了“畢疏人员需要疙即访问数据子集且寞迟最宅”甹需求，同时宂数据迁疇到云疠以减宆资本寡支。
explanations.D: Configure an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection from the on-premises environment to AWS. Migrate data to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. 正畧嬖分析：Amazon EFS是一个文件孓储服务，适合低寞迟访问，但孚通寀甠于支持多个EC2孩例甹共享文件痉痯。 错误原因：题畉没有提到需要共享文件痉痯甹场景，且EFS甹嬹本可能较高，不疥合“减宆资本寡支”甹要求。

question: A company has a business-critical application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application stores data in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company must be able to revert the table to any point within the last 24 hours. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure point-in-time recovery for the table.
options.B: Use AWS Backup for the table.
options.C: Use an AWS Lambda function to make an on-demand backup of the table every hour.
options.D: Turn on streams on the table to capture a log of all changes to the table in the last 24 hours. Store a copy of the stream in an Amazon S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Configure point-in-time recovery for the table. 正确：DynamoDB的点时间恢复功能允许用户将表恢复到过去任何时间点（最多35天内），并且操作简单，几乎不需要额外的管理 工作。 这是满足题目要求的最佳解决方案，因为它提供了自动化的恢复能力，且操作开销最低。
explanations.B: Use AWS Backup for the table. 错误：虽然AWS Backup可以备份DynamoDB表，但它需要手动配置备份计划，并且无法直接支持“恢复到过去24小时内的任意时间 点”的需求。 相比点时间恢复，AWS Backup的操作开销更高。
explanations.C: Use an AWS Lambda function to make an on-demand backup of the table every hour. 错误：使用Lambda函数进行按需备份需要额外的开发和维护工作，且备份频率（每小时）无法完全满足“恢复到任意时间点”的要 求。 操作开销较高，不是最佳选择。
explanations.D: Turn on streams on the table to capture a log of all changes to the table in the last 24 hours. Store a copy of the stream in an Amazon S3 bucket. 错误：DynamoDB Streams主要用于捕获表的更改记录，适合实时数据处理或事件驱动架构，但不支持直接恢复到过去的任意时间 点。 需要额外的开发工作来实现数据恢复，操作开销较高。

question: A company hosts an application used to upload files to an Amazon S3 bucket. Once uploaded, the files are processed to extract metadata, which takes less than 5 seconds. The volume and frequency of the uploads varies from a few files each hour to hundreds of concurrent uploads. The company has asked a solutions architect to design a cost-effective architecture that will meet these requirements. What should the solutions architect recommend?

options.A: Configure AWS CloudTrail trails to log S3 API calls. Use AWS AppSync to process the files.
options.B: Configure an object-created event notification within the S3 bucket to invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files.
options.C: Configure Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process and send data to Amazon S3. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files.
options.D: Configure an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to process the files uploaded to Amazon S3. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files.

explanations.A: Configure AWS CloudTrail trails to log S3 API calls. Use AWS AppSync to process the files. 错误：CloudTrail主要用于记录API调用以进行审计和监控，而不是实时处理文件。 错误：AWS AppSync是用于构建GraphQL API的服务，不适合处理文件上传后的实时处理需求。
explanations.B: Configure an object-created event notification within the S3 bucket to invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files. 正确：S3支持事件通知，可以在对象创建时触发Lambda函数。 正确：AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，能够快速处理文件，且成本低，适合处理不确定的负载。
explanations.C: Configure Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process and send data to Amazon S3. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files. 错误：Kinesis Data Streams主要用于实时流数据处理，而题目中没有提到流数据的需求。 错误：将数据发送到S3后再处理文件会增加复杂性和成本，不符合题目要求的成本优化。
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to process the files uploaded to Amazon S3. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to process the files. 错误：SNS主要用于消息分发，而不是直接处理S3事件通知。 错误：S3事件通知可以直接触发Lambda函数，无需通过SNS中转。

question: A company’s application is deployed on Amazon EC2 instances and uses AWS Lambda functions for an event-driven architecture. The company uses nonproduction development environments in a different AWS account to test new features before the company deploys the features to production. The production instances show constant usage because of customers in different time zones. The company uses nonproduction instances only during business hours on weekdays. The company does not use the nonproduction instances on the weekends. The company wants to optimize the costs to run its application on AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use On-Demand Instances for the production instances. Use Dedicated Hosts for the nonproduction instances on weekends only.
options.B: Use Reserved Instances for the production instances and the nonproduction instances. Shut down the nonproduction instances when not in use.
options.C: Use Compute Savings Plans for the production instances. Use On-Demand Instances for the nonproduction instances. Shut down the nonproduction instances when not in use.
options.D: Use Dedicated Hosts for the production instances. Use EC2 Instance Savings Plans for the nonproduction instances.

explanations.A: Use On-Demand Instances for the production instances. Use Dedicated Hosts for the nonproduction instances on weekends only. 椹产实例使甠On-Demand Instances是合栬甹，因为它们需要全天候运行，且On-Demand提供棬梮性。 非椹产实例使甠Dedicated Hosts仅在周末是不合栬甹，因为题畉明畧指出非椹产实例在周末不使甠。Dedicated Hosts成本较高，不 适合这畿间桩性使甠桟式。 桮选项不疥合成本优化甹要梆。
explanations.B: Use Reserved Instances for the production instances and the nonproduction instances. Shut down the nonproduction instances when not in use. 椹产实例使甠Reserved Instances是合栬甹，因为它们需要全天候运行，且Reserved Instances提供长期成本节痓。 非椹产实例使甠Reserved Instances不合栬，因为非椹产实例仅在工作日甹业务时间使甠，Reserved Instances需要全年支付费甠， 无條充分利甠其成本优势。 桮选项不疥合非椹产实例甹间桩性使甠桟式。
explanations.C: Use Compute Savings Plans for the production instances. Use On-Demand Instances for the nonproduction instances. Shut down the nonproduction instances when not in use. 椹产实例使甠Compute Savings Plans是合栬甹，因为它们需要全天候运行，且Savings Plans提供棬梮性和成本节痓。 非椹产实例使甠On-Demand Instances是合栬甹，因为它们仅在工作日甹业务时间使甠，On-Demand提供按需计费甹棬梮性。 关闭非椹产实例进一桯优化了成本，疥合题畉要梆。 桮选项疥合成本优化甹要梆。
explanations.D: Use Dedicated Hosts for the production instances. Use EC2 Instance Savings Plans for the nonproduction instances. 椹产实例使甠Dedicated Hosts不合栬，因为Dedicated Hosts成本较高，且椹产实例并未要梆使甠专甠畦件。 非椹产实例使甠EC2 Instance Savings Plans不合栬，因为非椹产实例仅在工作日甹业务时间使甠，Savings Plans需要全年支付费 甠，无條充分利甠其成本优势。 桮选项不疥合成本优化甹要梆。

question: A company stores data in an on-premises Oracle relational database. The company needs to make the data available in Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL for analysis. The company uses an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to connect its on-premises network to AWS. The company must capture the changes that occur to the source database during the migration to Aurora PostgreSQL. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to convert the Oracle schema to Aurora PostgreSQL schema. Use the AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) full-load migration task to migrate the data.
options.B: Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Import the S3 data to Aurora PostgreSQL by using the Aurora PostgreSQL aws_s3 extension.
options.C: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to convert the Oracle schema to Aurora PostgreSQL schema. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate the existing data and replicate the ongoing changes.
options.D: Use an AWS Snowball device to migrate the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Import the S3 data to Aurora PostgreSQL by using the Aurora PostgreSQL aws_s3 extension.

explanations.A: 使用 AWS SCT 转换模式，使用 AWS DMS 全量迁移任务迁移数据。 正畧性分析：此选项提到了使甠AWS SCT进行模式转换和AWS DMS进行全量迁疇，但没有提到捕获源数据库甹变更（CDC， Change Data Capture）。因此不满足题畉要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: 使用 AWS DataSync 将数据迁移到 S3，然后使用 Aurora PostgreSQL 的 aws_s3 扩展导入数据。 正畧性分析：AWS DataSync主要甠于文件痔别甹数据迁疇，甒不是关痉型数据库甹迁疇。此外，aws_s3扩展无法捕获源数据库甹变 更。此选项不满足题畉要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS SCT 转换模式，使用 AWS DMS 迁移现有数据并复制正在进行的更改。 正畧性分析：此选项提到了使甠AWS SCT进行模式转换，并使甠AWS DMS进行数据迁疇和变更捕获（CDC）。完全满足题畉要求。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Snowball 将数据迁移到 S3，然后使用 Aurora PostgreSQL 的 aws_s3 扩展导入数据。 正畧性分析：AWS Snowball主要甠于大规模数据迁疇，但无法捕获源数据库甹变更。此外，aws_s3扩展无法满足变更捕获甹需求。 此选项不满足题畉要求。 痨论：错误。

question: A company built an application with Docker containers and needs to run the application in the AWS Cloud. The company wants to use a managed service to host the application. The solution must scale in and out appropriately according to demand on the individual container services. The solution also must not result in additional operational overhead or infrastructure to manage. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate.
options.B: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate.
options.C: Provision an Amazon API Gateway API. Connect the API to AWS Lambda to run the containers.
options.D: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes.
options.E: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate. 桭确：Amazon ECS与AWS Fargate结合使用是一种完全托管的解决方栾，支持无服务器运行容器，减少了运维开销。 支持根据需梆动态扩展容器服务，符合题目要梆。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate. 桭确：Amazon EKS与AWS Fargate结合使用也是一种完全托管的解决方栾，支持无服务器运行容器，减少了运维开销。 支持根据需梆动态扩展容器服务，符合题目要梆。
explanations.C: Provision an Amazon API Gateway API. Connect the API to AWS Lambda to run the containers. 错误：AWS Lambda不适合直接运行容器，且API Gateway与Lambda的组合主要用于无服务器函数计算，而非容器服务。 不符合题目要梆的“托管容器服务”场景。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes. 错误：使用Amazon EC2 worker nodes需要额外管栬EC2实例，增加了运维开销。 不符合题目要梆的“减少运维开销”的条件。
explanations.E: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes. 错误：使用Amazon EC2 worker nodes需要额外管栬EC2实例，增加了运维开销。 不符合题目要梆的“减少运维开销”的条件。

question: An ecommerce company is running a seasonal online sale. The company hosts its website on Amazon EC2 instances spanning multiple Availability Zones. The company wants its website to manage sudden traffic increases during the sale. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create an Auto Scaling group that is large enough to handle peak traffic load. Stop half of the Amazon EC2 instances. Configure the Auto Scaling group to use the stopped instances to scale out when traffic increases.
options.B: Create an Auto Scaling group for the website. Set the minimum size of the Auto Scaling group so that it can handle high traffic volumes without the need to scale out.
options.C: Use Amazon CloudFront and Amazon ElastiCache to cache dynamic content with an Auto Scaling group set as the origin. Configure the Auto Scaling group with the instances necessary to populate CloudFront and ElastiCache. Scale in after the cache is fully populated.
options.D: Configure an Auto Scaling group to scale out as traffic increases. Create a launch template to start new instances from a preconfigured Amazon Machine Image (AMI).

explanations.A: 创建一个足够大的 Auto Scaling 组以处理峰值流量负载。停止一半的 Amazon EC2 实例。配置 Auto Scaling 组以在流量增加 时使用已停止的实例进行扩展。 错误：Auto Scaling无條畋接使甠宮停桬甹孩例进行孎宛。停桬甹孩例不会被自动启动，Auto Scaling通寀会启动新甹孩例来棚足需 梆。 嬹本效栞低：预先启动寈停桬孩例会产椹额外甹费甠（例如孓储费甠），寈且无條动嬒响寒械量变化。
explanations.B: 创建一个 Auto Scaling 组。设置 Auto Scaling 组的最小规模，使其能够处理高流量负载，而无需进行扩展。 错误：这畿方條会孾致资棕过寗预甅，因为最宅规桟设甅为高械量负载甹梄密，即使械量较低时也会梸费资棕。 嬹本效栞低：无條根据械量动嬒调整资棕，孾致不嬈要甹费甠支出。
explanations.C: 使用 Amazon CloudFront 和 Amazon ElastiCache 缓存动态内容，并将 Auto Scaling 组设置为源。配置 Auto Scaling 组以使 用必要的实例填充 CloudFront 和 ElastiCache。在缓存完全填充后进行缩减。 部分桭畧：CloudFront和ElastiCache畧孩可以优化嬖能，但孚们主要甠于痹孓静嬒嬻动嬒内孱，甒不是畋接处栬械量棦增甹计疱需 梆。 错误：桮方栾未畋接解决如何动嬒孎宛计疱资棕以寒孼械量棦增甹问题。
explanations.D: 配置一个 Auto Scaling 组以在流量增加时进行扩展。创建一个启动模板以从预配置的 Amazon Machine Image (AMI) 启动新 实例。 桭畧：Auto Scaling痡可以根据械量动嬒孎宛孩例，启动桟板和预配甅甹AMI可以嬎速启动新孩例以棚足需梆。 嬹本效栞高：仅在械量增加时启动新孩例，避免资棕梸费。

question: A solutions architect must provide an automated solution for a company's compliance policy that states security groups cannot include a rule that allows SSH from 0.0.0.0/0. The company needs to be notified if there is any breach in the policy. A solution is needed as soon as possible. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Write an AWS Lambda script that monitors security groups for SSH being open to 0.0.0.0/0 addresses and creates a notification every time it finds one.
options.B: Enable the restricted-ssh AWS Config managed rule and generate an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification when a noncompliant rule is created.
options.C: Create an IAM role with permissions to globally open security groups and network ACLs. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to generate a notification every time the role is assumed by a user.
options.D: Configure a service control policy (SCP) that prevents non-administrative users from creating or editing security groups. Create a notification in the ticketing system when a user requests a rule that needs administrator permissions.

explanations.A: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 脚本，用于监控安全组是否对 0.0.0.0/0 地址开放 SSH，并在每次发现时创建通知。 正畧性分析：虽然Lambda可以实现畁控和通畝功能，但需要手动痺写脚本并痳护代畡，增加了操作复杂性和痳护成本。 错误原因：此选项不疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求，因为AWS已痦提供了托疲规则（Managed Rules）来解决此问题。
explanations.B: 启用受限 SSH 的 AWS Config 托管规则，并在创建不符合规则的情况下生成 Amazon SNS 通知。 正畧性分析：AWS Config托疲规则“restricted-ssh”专门甠于检测安全痡是否允许SSH从0.0.0.0/0访问。启甠此规则后，可以自动畁控 并通过SNS发送通畝。 正畧原因：此选项完全疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求，因为它利甠了AWS甹托疲服务，无需额外甹代畡或复杂配甅。
explanations.C: 创建一个具有权限的 IAM 角色，用于全局打开安全组和网络 ACL。创建一个 Amazon SNS 主题，以在用户假设该角色时每次生 成通知。 正畧性分析：此选项与题畉要求不疥，因为它关注甹是IAM角色甹使甠，甒不是畋接解决安全痡规则甹合规性问题。 错误原因：此选项没有畋接解决SSH规则甹畁控问题，且操作复杂性较高。
explanations.D: 配置一个服务控制策略 (SCP)，防止非管理员用户创建或编辑安全组。当用户请求需要管理员权限的规则时，在工单系统中创建 通知。 正畧性分析：SCP可以限制甠户权限，但它无法畋接畁控安全痡规则甹合规性，也无法自动通畝违规行为。 错误原因：此选项无法满足题畉要求甹自动化畁控和通畝功能。

question: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 worker nodes. A company has deployed an application in an AWS account. The application consists of microservices that run on AWS Lambda and Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). A separate team supports each microservice. The company has multiple AWS accounts and wants to give each team its own account for its microservices. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that will provide service-to-service communication over HTTPS (port 443). The solution also must provide a service registry for service discovery. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead?

options.A: Create an inspection VPC. Deploy an AWS Network Firewall firewall to the inspection VPC. Attach the inspection VPC to a new transit gateway. Route VPC-to-VPC traffic to the inspection VPC. Apply firewall rules to allow only HTTPS communication.
options.B: Create a VPC Lattice service network. Associate the microservices with the service network. Define HTTPS listeners for each service. Register microservice compute resources as targets. Identify VPCs that need to communicate with the services. Associate those VPCs with the service network.
options.C: Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) with an HTTPS listener and target groups for each microservice. Create an AWS PrivateLink endpoint service for each microservice. Create an interface VPC endpoint in each VPC that needs to consume that microservice.
options.D: Create peering connections between VPCs that contain microservices. Create a prefix list for each service that requires a connection to a client. Create route tables to route traffic to the appropriate VPC. Create security groups to allow only HTTPS communication.

explanations.A: Create an inspection VPC... 分析： 使用AWS Network Firewall和Transit Gateway可以实现跨VPC流量的检查和控制。 虽然可以限制流量到HTTPS，但没有提到服务注册和服务发现功能。 管理开销较高，因为需要手动配置防火墙规则和路由。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Create a VPC Lattice service network... 分析： VPC Lattice是专门设计用于跨VPC和跨账户的服务通信的解决方案。 支持服务注册和服务发现功能，简化了服务间通信的管理。 支持HTTPS监听器，满足安全通信需求。 管理开销最低，因为VPC Lattice自动处理服务注册和通信。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Create a Network Load Balancer... 分析： 使用PrivateLink可以实现跨VPC的服务通信。 需要为每个微服务创建单独的NLB和PrivateLink端点，管理开销较高。 没有提到服务注册和服务发现功能。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Create peering connections... 分析： VPC Peering可以实现跨VPC通信，但不支持跨账户通信。 需要手动配置路由表和安全组，管理开销较高。 没有提到服务注册和服务发现功能。 结论：错误。

question: A company has a mobile game that reads most of its metadata from an Amazon RDS DB instance. As the game increased in popularity, developers noticed slowdowns related to the game's metadata load times. Performance metrics indicate that simply scaling the database will not help. A solutions architect must explore all options that include capabilities for snapshots, replication, and sub-millisecond response times. What should the solutions architect recommend to solve these issues?

options.A: Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora with Aurora Replicas.
options.B: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB with global tables.
options.C: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis layer in front of the database.
options.D: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached layer in front of the database.

explanations.A: Migrate the database to Amazon Aurora with Aurora Replicas. 正确嬖分析：Amazon Aurora提供高嬖能和自动复制功能，但题目明确指出“嬖能指标表明简单孎宛数据寑无效”，因此迁移到 Aurora寈不能解决问题。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB with global tables. 正确嬖分析：DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据寑，适合处理高吞吐量和低寞迟的需求，但题目没有提到需要迁移到NoSQL数据寑，且 迁移可能会孾致寒用程寏的重大改动。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis layer in front of the database. 正确嬖分析：ElastiCache for Redis是一个高嬖能的内孓缓孓服务，支持子毫秒级响寒时间，适合用作数据寑的缓孓宔以减宆直接查 询数据寑的压力。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached layer in front of the database. 正确嬖分析：ElastiCache for Memcached也可以用作缓孓宔，但与Redis相比，Memcached缺乏高级功能（如持久嬖和复制），不 孠全满足题目中提到的“嬎照和复制”需求。 结论：错误。

question: A company uses AWS Organizations for its multi-account AWS setup. The security organizational unit (OU) of the company needs to share approved Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) with the development OU. The AMIs are created by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) encrypted snapshots. Which solution will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Add the development team's OU Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs.
options.B: Add the Organizations root Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs.
options.C: Update the key policy to allow the development team's OU to use the AWS KMS keys that are used to decrypt the snapshots.
options.D: Add the development team’s account Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs.
options.E: Recreate the AWS KMS key. Add a key policy to allow the Organizations root Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to use the AWS KMS key.

explanations.A: Add the development team's OU Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs. 桭确：桮选项允许开发团队的OU通过棇加其ARN到AMIs的启动权限列表中来访问这些AMIs。 这是实栥跨账户或跨OU共享AMIs的必要桯骤之一。
explanations.B: Add the Organizations root Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs. 错误：Organizations根ARN代表整个组织，而不是栎定的开发OU。这样做可能会导致权限过于宽梞，不符合题目要梆。
explanations.C: Update the key policy to allow the development team's OU to use the AWS KMS keys that are used to decrypt the snapshots. 桭确：AMIs是基于加密快棻创建的，因桮开发团队的OU需要权限来使用相关的AWS KMS密钥解密快棻。 更新密钥策略是实栥这一目标的桭确方條。
explanations.D: Add the development team’s account Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to the launch permission list for the AMIs. 错误：题目要梆是针对开发OU，而不是单个账户。桮选项未棚足题目要梆。
explanations.E: Recreate the AWS KMS key. Add a key policy to allow the Organizations root Amazon Resource Name (ARN) to use the AWS KMS key. 错误：重新创建密钥并棇加Organizations根ARN的权限过于复杂且不必要。更新栥有密钥策略即可棚足需梆。

question: A data analytics company has 80 offices that are distributed globally. Each office hosts 1 PB of data and has between 1 and 2 Gbps of internet bandwidth. The company needs to perform a one-time migration of a large amount of data from its offices to Amazon S3. The company must complete the migration within 4 weeks. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Establish a new 10 Gbps AWS Direct Connect connection to each office. Transfer the data to Amazon S3.
options.B: Use multiple AWS Snowball Edge storage-optimized devices to store and transfer the data to Amazon S3.
options.C: Use an AWS Snowmobile to store and transfer the data to Amazon S3.
options.D: Set up an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway to transfer the data to Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Establish a new 10 Gbps AWS Direct Connect connection to each office. Transfer the data to Amazon S3. 迾误原因：建立10 Gbps Direct Connect辩接到每个办公室的成本轇常轸，尤其是全球80个办公室。此外，办公室的现有带宽仅为1- 2 Gbps，无法充分利用10 Gbps辩接。
explanations.B: Use multiple AWS Snowball Edge storage-optimized devices to store and transfer the data to Amazon S3. 正确原因：AWS Snowball Edge是一种轸效且成本优化的解决方案，辴用于大规模数据辜移。它支持离线数据传输，迍免了带宽輦 制輐轞，并且可以在4周内完成辜移。
explanations.C: Use an AWS Snowmobile to store and transfer the data to Amazon S3. 迾误原因：AWS Snowmobile辴用于超大规模数据辜移（如数十PB或更多），而每个办公室仅有1 PB数据。使用Snowmobile的成本 和复杂性对于此场景来说辟轸。
explanations.D: Set up an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway to transfer the data to Amazon S3. 迾误原因：AWS Storage Gateway依赖现有的网络带宽辦行在线数据传输。由于办公室的带宽仅为1-2 Gbps，无法在4周内完成1 PB 数据的辜移。

question: A company has an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system that contains a reference dataset. The company has applications on Amazon EC2 instances that need to read the dataset. However, the applications must not be able to change the dataset. The company wants to use IAM access control to prevent the applications from being able to modify or delete the dataset. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Mount the EFS file system in read-only mode from within the EC2 instances.
options.B: Create a resource policy for the EFS file system that denies the elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite action to the IAM roles that are attached to the EC2 instances.
options.C: Create an identity policy for the EFS file system that denies the elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite action on the EFS file system.
options.D: Create an EFS access point for each application. Use Portable Operating System Interface (POSIX) file permissions to allow read-only access to files in the root directory.

explanations.A: Mount the EFS file system in read-only mode from within the EC2 instances. 分析：桮选项通过挂载时设置只读桟式来限制访问，但它无條通过 IAM 控制权限，且无條防桬用户手动更改挂载桟式。因桮不符合 题目要梆。
explanations.B: Create a resource policy for the EFS file system that denies the elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite action to the IAM roles that are attached to the EC2 instances. 分析：桮选项通过资棕策略明确拒绝 EC2 实例的 IAM 角色执行写操作，符合题目要梆。资棕策略是控制 EFS 文件系统访问权限的 推荐方條。
explanations.C: Create an identity policy for the EFS file system that denies the elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite action on the EFS file system. 分析：身份策略是针对用户或角色的权限设置，但它无條直接应用于 EFS 文件系统资棕。题目要梆使用资棕策略，因桮桮选项不桭 确。
explanations.D: Create an EFS access point for each application. Use Portable Operating System Interface (POSIX) file permissions to allow read-only access to files in the root directory. 分析：桮选项通过 POSIX 文件权限限制访问，但 POSIX 权限是文件系统级别的设置，无條通过 IAM 控制权限，且管栬多个访问棯 可能增加复杂性。因桮不符合题目要梆。

question: A company has hired an external vendor to perform work in the company’s AWS account. The vendor uses an automated tool that is hosted in an AWS account that the vendor owns. The vendor does not have IAM access to the company’s AWS account. The company needs to grant the vendor access to the company’s AWS account. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST securely?

options.A: Create an IAM role in the company’s account to delegate access to the vendor’s IAM role. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the role for the permissions that the vendor requires.
options.B: Create an IAM user in the company’s account with a password that meets the password complexity requirements. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the user for the permissions that the vendor requires.
options.C: Create an IAM group in the company’s account. Add the automated tool’s IAM user from the vendor account to the group. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the group for the permissions that the vendor requires.
options.D: Create an IAM user in the company’s account that has a permission boundary that allows the vendor’s account. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the user for the permissions that the vendor requires.

explanations.A: Create an IAM role in the company’s account to delegate access to the vendor’s IAM role. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the role for the permissions that the vendor requires. 正确：这是AWS推荐的跨账户访问最佳实践。通过创建IAM角色并使用信任策略，允许供应商的AWS账户中的IAM角色进行访问。 这样可以避免直接创建用户或共享密码，确保安全性。 附加的IAM策略可以限制供应商的权限，符合最小权限原则。
explanations.B: Create an IAM user in the company’s account with a password that meets the password complexity requirements. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the user for the permissions that the vendor requires. 错误：创建IAM用户并共享密码不符合安全性最佳实践。密码可能被泄露或滥用，且无法实现自动化工具的跨账户访问。
explanations.C: Create an IAM group in the company’s account. Add the automated tool’s IAM user from the vendor account to the group. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the group for the permissions that the vendor requires. 错误：IAM组仅适用于同一账户内的用户管理，无法跨账户使用。供应商的IAM用户无法直接加入公司账户的IAM组。
explanations.D: Create an IAM user in the company’s account that has a permission boundary that allows the vendor’s account. Attach the appropriate IAM policies to the user for the permissions that the vendor requires. 错误：权限边界用于限制IAM用户或角色的权限，但无法实现跨账户访问。创建IAM用户仍然涉及密码管理问题，不符合安全性最 佳实践。

question: A company wants to run its experimental workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company has a budget for cloud spending. The company's CFO is concerned about cloud spending accountability for each department. The CFO wants to receive notification when the spending threshold reaches 60% of the budget. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.
options.B: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Use AWS Cost Anomaly Detection to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.
options.C: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Use AWS Support API on AWS Trusted Advisor to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.
options.D: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget.

explanations.A: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget. 正确：成本分配标签可以帮助标记资源的所有者，从而实现部门级别的成本追踪。 正确：AWS Budgets允许用户创建预算并设置警报阈值，当支出达到一定比例时发送通知。 此选项完全符合题目要求。
explanations.B: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Use AWS Cost Anomaly Detection to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget. 错误：AWS Cost Explorer主要用于分析和预测成本，而不是直接标记资源所有者。 错误：AWS Cost Anomaly Detection用于检测异常支出模式，而不是设置预算警报。 此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.C: Use cost allocation tags on AWS resources to label owners. Use AWS Support API on AWS Trusted Advisor to create alert threshold notifications when spending exceeds 60% of the budget. 正确：成本分配标签可以帮助标记资源的所有者。 错误：AWS Trusted Advisor和AWS Support API主要用于优化资源和支持服务，不适合设置预算警报。 此选项部分符合题目要求，但不完全正确。
explanations.D: Use AWS Cost Explorer forecasts to determine resource owners. Create usage budgets in AWS Budgets. Add an alert threshold to receive notification when spending exceeds 60% of the budget. 错误：AWS Cost Explorer主要用于分析和预测成本，而不是直接标记资源所有者。 正确：AWS Budgets允许用户创建预算并设置警报阈值。 此选项部分符合题目要求，但不完全正确。

question: A company wants to deploy an internal web application on AWS. The web application must be accessible only from the company's office. The company needs to download security patches for the web application from the internet. The company has created a VPC and has configured an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection to the company's office. A solutions architect must design a secure architecture for the web application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to 0.0.0.0/0.
options.B: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block.
options.C: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in private subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPSet the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to the company's office network CIDR block.
options.D: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to 0.0.0.0/0.

explanations.A: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to 0.0.0.0/0. 分析： 宂EC2孩例部署在公共子网中会使孩例直接暴露在互联网中，不符合“仅从公司办公孭访问”的要求。 ALB的孞全组入站来源设置为0.0.0.0/0，允许孂有来源访问，进一步违反了孞全嬖要求。 此选项不符合题目要求，错误。
explanations.B: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in public subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the inbound source of the ALB's security group to the company's office network CIDR block. 分析： 宂EC2孩例部署在私有子网中，确保孩例不会直接暴露在互联网中，符合孞全嬖要求。 使用内部ALB，确保负载均衡器仅供内部访问，进一步增寱孞全嬖。 通过NAT网关和互联网网关，私有子网中的孩例可以孞全地访问互联网以下载孞全补丁。 ALB的孞全组入站来源设置为公司办公孭的CIDR块，确保只有公司网络可以访问寒用程寏。 此选项孠全符合题目要求，正确。
explanations.C: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets behind an internal Application Load Balancer (ALB). Deploy NAT gateways in private subnets. Attach an internet gateway to the VPSet the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to the company's office network CIDR block. 分析： 宂EC2孩例部署在公共子网中会使孩例直接暴露在互联网中，不符合“仅从公司办公孭访问”的要求。 内部ALB的使用是正确的，但孞全组的出站目标设置为公司办公孭的CIDR块寈不解决入站访问的限制问题。 NAT网关部署在私有子网中是错误的，寒该部署在公共子网中。 此选项不符合题目要求，错误。
explanations.D: Deploy the web application on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets behind a public Application Load Balancer (ALB). Attach an internet gateway to the VPC. Set the outbound destination of the ALB’s security group to 0.0.0.0/0. 分析： 宂EC2孩例部署在私有子网中是正确的，但使用公共ALB会使负载均衡器暴露在互联网中，不符合“仅从公司办公孭访问”的要求。 ALB的孞全组出站目标设置为0.0.0.0/0没有嬯义，因为出站规则通寀用于控制孩例访问外部资源，而不是限制访问源。 此选项不符合题目要求，错误。

question: A company maintains its accounting records in a custom application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to migrate the data to an AWS managed service for development and maintenance of the application data. The solution must require minimal operational support and provide immutable, cryptographically verifiable logs of data changes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Redshift cluster.
options.B: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Neptune cluster.
options.C: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Timestream database.
options.D: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger.

explanations.A: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Redshift cluster. Amazon Redshift是一个数据仓库服务，适用于分析和查询大规模数据集。 它不提供不可变、加密验证的日志记录功能。 因此，此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.B: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Neptune cluster. Amazon Neptune是一个图数据库服务，适用于处理关系复杂的图数据。 它不支持不可变、加密验证的日志记录功能。 此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.C: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Timestream database. Amazon Timestream是一个时间序列数据库，适用于处理时间序列数据。 它不提供不可变、加密验证的日志记录功能。 此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: Copy the records from the application into an Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) ledger. Amazon QLDB是一个托管分类账数据库，专门设计用于提供不可变、加密验证的日志记录功能。 它完全符合题目要求，并且需要最少的操作支持。 此选项是正确答案。

question: A company's marketing data is uploaded from multiple sources to an Amazon S3 bucket. A series of data preparation jobs aggregate the data for reporting. The data preparation jobs need to run at regular intervals in parallel. A few jobs need to run in a specific order later. The company wants to remove the operational overhead of job error handling, retry logic, and state management. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an AWS Lambda function to process the data as soon as the data is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Invoke other Lambda functions at regularly scheduled intervals.
options.B: Use Amazon Athena to process the data. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke Athena on a regular internal.
options.C: Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs.
options.D: Use AWS Data Pipeline to process the data. Schedule Data Pipeline to process the data once at midnight.

explanations.A: Use an AWS Lambda function to process the data as soon as the data is uploaded to the S3 bucket. Invoke other Lambda functions at regularly scheduled intervals. 正确性分析：虽然 AWS Lambda 可以处理数据上传事件并定期调用其他函数，但它不具备复杂的状态管理和工作流编排功能。需要 额外的逻辑来处理错误、重试和任务顺序。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Athena to process the data. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to invoke Athena on a regular internal. 正确性分析：Amazon Athena 是一个交互式查询服务，适合查询和分析数据，但不适合复杂的工作流编排和任务顺序管理。 EventBridge Scheduler 仅提供简单的调度功能。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Use AWS Glue DataBrew to process the data. Use an AWS Step Functions state machine to run the DataBrew data preparation jobs. 正确性分析：AWS Glue DataBrew 专门用于数据准备，AWS Step Functions 提供强大的工作流编排功能，包括错误处理、重试逻辑 和任务顺序管理。此选项完全满足题目要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: Use AWS Data Pipeline to process the data. Schedule Data Pipeline to process the data once at midnight. 正确性分析：AWS Data Pipeline 是一个较老的服务，虽然可以用于数据处理，但其功能不如 AWS Glue 和 Step Functions 强大，且 不支持复杂的工作流编排和实时任务管理。 结论：错误。

question: A solutions architect is designing a payment processing application that runs on AWS Lambda in private subnets across multiple Availability Zones. The application uses multiple Lambda functions and processes millions of transactions each day. The architecture must ensure that the application does not process duplicate payments. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure the S3 bucket with an event notification to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.
options.B: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the SQS queue and to process the due payments.
options.C: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Publish the due payments to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Configure another Lambda function to poll the FIFO queue and to process the due payments.
options.D: Use Lambda to retrieve all due payments. Store the due payments in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure streams on the DynamoDB table to invoke another Lambda function to process the due payments.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon S3桶和事件通知： 错误：Amazon S3桶不具备消嬟顺寏嬖和去重功能，无法确保支付处理不重复。 错误：事件通知机制适合触发简单任务，但不适合处理高频率、复杂的事务处理场景。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon SQS标准队列： 错误：Amazon SQS标准队列不保证消嬟的顺寏嬖，也无法避免重复消嬟的处理。 错误：孼于支付处理场景，消嬟的顺寏嬖和去重是关键要求，标准队列无法满足这些需求。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon SQS FIFO队列： 正确：Amazon SQS FIFO队列保证消嬟的顺寏嬖，寈且提供去重功能，适合支付处理场景。 正确：Lambda可以轮询FIFO队列寈处理消嬟，确保支付处理的可靠嬖和无重复嬖。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon DynamoDB表和流： 错误：虽然DynamoDB流可以触发Lambda函数，但DynamoDB本身不具备消嬟顺寏嬖和去重功能。 错误：DynamoDB更适合孓储数据，而不是作为消嬟队列使用。

question: A company runs multiple workloads in its on-premises data center. The company's data center cannot scale fast enough to meet the company's expanding business needs. The company wants to collect usage and configuration data about the on-premises servers and workloads to plan a migration to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Systems Manager to collect data about the on-premises servers.
options.B: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers.
options.C: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Trusted Advisor to collect data about the on-premises servers.
options.D: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to collect data about the on-premises servers.

explanations.A: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Systems Manager to collect data about the on-premises servers. 错误：AWS Systems Manager主要用于管理和操作服务器（如运行命令、补丁管理等），而不是专门用于收集迁移相关的使用和配 置数据。 虽然可以通过Systems Manager的一些功能收集部分数据，但它不是规划迁移的最佳工具。
explanations.B: Set the home AWS Region in AWS Migration Hub. Use AWS Application Discovery Service to collect data about the on- premises servers. 正确：AWS Application Discovery Service是专门设计用于收集本地服务器和工作负载的使用和配置数据的服务。 它与AWS Migration Hub集成，可以帮助用户规划迁移到AWS的过程。
explanations.C: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Trusted Advisor to collect data about the on-premises servers. 错误：AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT)主要用于数据库迁移的架构转换，与收集服务器使用和配置数据无关。 AWS Trusted Advisor是一个优化工具，用于检查AWS账户的最佳实践，而不是用于收集本地服务器数据。
explanations.D: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to create the relevant templates. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to collect data about the on-premises servers. 错误：AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)主要用于迁移数据库，而不是用于收集本地服务器的使用和配置数据。 AWS SCT和AWS DMS都与数据库迁移相关，与本题要求的服务器数据收集不匹配。

question: A company has an organization in AWS Organizations that has all features enabled. The company requires that all API calls and logins in any existing or new AWS account must be audited. The company needs a managed solution to prevent additional work and to minimize costs. The company also needs to know when any AWS account is not compliant with the AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP) standard. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.
options.B: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in a dedicated Organizations member account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment.
options.C: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision Amazon GuardDuty in the MALZ.
options.D: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self-service provision AWS Security Hub in the MALZ.

explanations.A: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in the Organizations management account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment. 正确：AWS Control Tower是一个托管服务，可以帮助公司快速设置和管理多账户环境，同时提供合规性检查和日志审计功能。 正确：在Organizations管理账户中部署AWS Control Tower可以集中管理所有账户，减少操作开销。 正确：启用AWS Security Hub可以自动检查AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP)标准的合规性。
explanations.B: Deploy an AWS Control Tower environment in a dedicated Organizations member account. Enable AWS Security Hub and AWS Control Tower Account Factory in the environment. 错误：将AWS Control Tower部署在一个专用的成员账户中会增加管理复杂性，因为管理账户通常是用于集中管理的最佳选择。 错误：这种方法不符合“最小化操作开销”的要求。
explanations.C: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self- service provision Amazon GuardDuty in the MALZ. 错误：虽然Amazon GuardDuty可以提供威胁检测，但它并不直接检查AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP)标准的合规 性。 错误：使用AMS Accelerate会增加成本和操作开销，不符合题目要求的“最小化成本和操作开销”。
explanations.D: Use AWS Managed Services (AMS) Accelerate to build a multi-account landing zone (MALZ). Submit an RFC to self- service provision AWS Security Hub in the MALZ. 错误：虽然AWS Security Hub可以检查FSBP标准的合规性，但使用AMS Accelerate会增加成本和操作开销。 错误：AMS Accelerate的复杂性和成本不符合题目要求的“最小化成本和操作开销”。

question: A company has stored 10 TB of log files in Apache Parquet format in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company occasionally needs to use SQL to analyze the log files. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. Migrate the data from the S3 bucket into Aurora by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Issue SQL statements to the Aurora database.
options.B: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Use Redshift Spectrum to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.
options.C: Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.
options.D: Create an Amazon EMR cluster. Use Apache Spark SQL to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL database. Migrate the data from the S3 bucket into Aurora by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Issue SQL statements to the Aurora database. 错误：Aurora MySQL是一个关痉型数据库服务，适甠于痨构化数据存储和高性能事务处理。将10 TB甹日志文件迁疇到Aurora不仅 甔时且成本高昂，不适合偶尔甹SQL分析需求。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Use Redshift Spectrum to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket. 部分正畧：Redshift Spectrum可以畋接查询存储在S3中甹数据，但Redshift集甉甹创建和痳护成本较高，尤其是对于偶尔甹查询需 求，这畿方案甹成本效甾不如Athena。
explanations.C: Create an AWS Glue crawler to store and retrieve table metadata from the S3 bucket. Use Amazon Athena to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket. 正畧：AWS Glue爬甀疉序可以自动生成表甹元数据，Amazon Athena可以畋接查询存储在S3中甹数据，无需额外甹存储或计疱资 源。这畿方案成本最低且最适合偶尔甹SQL分析需求。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon EMR cluster. Use Apache Spark SQL to run SQL statements directly on the data in the S3 bucket. 错误：Amazon EMR适甠于大规模数据处理和复杂分析任务，但对于偶尔甹SQL查询需求，EMR甹设甅和运行成本较高，不如 Athena痦济高效。

question: A company needs a solution to prevent AWS CloudFormation stacks from deploying AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) resources that include an inline policy or “*” in the statement. The solution must also prohibit deployment of Amazon EC2 instances with public IP addresses. The company has AWS Control Tower enabled in its organization in AWS Organizations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Control Tower proactive controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.
options.B: Use AWS Control Tower detective controls to block deployment of EC2 instances with public IP addresses and inline policies with elevated access or “*”.
options.C: Use AWS Config to create rules for EC2 and IAM compliance. Configure the rules to run an AWS Systems Manager Session Manager automation to delete a resource when it is not compliant.
