explanations.D: Deploy an identity provider (IdP) on Amazon EC2. Link the IdP as an identity source within AWS IAM Identity Center. 错误：此选项建议在 EC2 上部署一个新的 IdP，但题目要求继续使用现有的 on-premises Active Directory。 此方法增加了复杂性，并不符合题目要求的最佳实践。

question: A company is planning to deploy its application on an Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless v2 cluster. The application will receive large amounts of traffic. The company wants to optimize the storage performance of the cluster as the load on the application increases. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora Standard storage configuration.
options.B: Configure the cluster storage type as Provisioned IOPS.
options.C: Configure the cluster storage type as General Purpose.
options.D: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora I/O-Optimized storage configuration.

explanations.A: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora Standard storage configuration. 错误：Aurora Standard 是默认的存储配置，但它在高负载情况下可能无法提供最佳性能。 虽然成本较低，但不适合需要高性能存储的场景。
explanations.B: Configure the cluster storage type as Provisioned IOPS. 错误：Provisioned IOPS 提供了高性能存储，但成本较高，不是最具成本效益的解决方案。 适用于需要极高 IOPS 的场景，但 Aurora Serverless v2 通常不需要这种配置。
explanations.C: Configure the cluster storage type as General Purpose. 错误：General Purpose 存储类型适合中等性能需求，但在高负载情况下可能无法满足性能要求。 成本较低，但性能不如 Aurora I/O-Optimized。
explanations.D: Configure the cluster to use the Aurora I/O-Optimized storage configuration. 正确：Aurora I/O-Optimized 是专门设计用于高性能和高负载场景的存储配置。 它消除了 I/O 请求成本，同时提供了更高的性能，是最具成本效益的解决方案。

question: A financial services company that runs on AWS has designed its security controls to meet industry standards. The industry standards include the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) and the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS). The company's third-party auditors need proof that the designed controls have been implemented and are functioning correctly. The company has hundreds of AWS accounts in a single organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs to monitor the current state of the controls across accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Designate one account as the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. Integrate Inspector with Organizations to discover and scan resources across all AWS accounts. Enable Inspector industry standards for NIST and PCI DSS.
options.B: Designate one account as the Amazon GuardDuty delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. In the designated GuardDuty administrator account, enable GuardDuty to protect all member accounts. Enable GuardDuty industry standards for NIST and PCI DSS.
options.C: Configure an AWS CloudTrail organization trail in the Organizations management account. Designate one account as the compliance account. Enable CloudTrail security standards for NIST and PCI DSS in the compliance account.
options.D: Designate one account as the AWS Security Hub delegated administrator account from the Organizations management account. In the designated Security Hub administrator account, enable Security Hub for all member accounts. Enable Security Hub standards for NIST and PCI DSS.

explanations.A: Designate one account as the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator account... Amazon Inspector主要用于自动化的安全评估和漏洞扫描，但它并不直接提供对行业标准（如NIST和PCI DSS）的合规性监控。 虽然Inspector可以发现和扫描资源，但它的功能不完全覆盖合规性验证的需求，因此此选项不符合题目要求。 错误原因：Inspector的功能与题目要求的合规性监控不完全匹配。
explanations.B: Designate one account as the Amazon GuardDuty delegated administrator account... Amazon GuardDuty主要用于威胁检测和异常行为监控，而不是专门设计用于行业标准（如NIST和PCI DSS）的合规性验证。 GuardDuty无法直接提供对行业标准的合规性监控，因此此选项不符合题目要求。 错误原因：GuardDuty的功能侧重于威胁检测，而非合规性验证。
explanations.C: Configure an AWS CloudTrail organization trail... AWS CloudTrail主要用于记录API调用和用户活动日志，但它并不直接提供对行业标准（如NIST和PCI DSS）的合规性监控。 虽然CloudTrail可以帮助审计活动，但它无法直接验证安全控制的实施和功能，因此此选项不符合题目要求。 错误原因：CloudTrail的功能侧重于日志记录，而非合规性验证。
explanations.D: Designate one account as the AWS Security Hub delegated administrator account... AWS Security Hub专门设计用于集中管理和监控安全状态，并支持行业标准（如NIST和PCI DSS）的合规性验证。 Security Hub可以整合来自多个AWS服务的数据，并提供合规性检查功能，因此完全符合题目要求。 正确原因：Security Hub支持行业标准的合规性验证，并能够集中管理多个账户的安全状态。

question: A company uses an Amazon S3 bucket as its data lake storage platform. The S3 bucket contains a massive amount of data that is accessed randomly by multiple teams and hundreds of applications. The company wants to reduce the S3 storage costs and provide immediate availability for frequently accessed objects. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?

options.A: Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition objects to the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class.
options.B: Store objects in Amazon S3 Glacier. Use S3 Select to provide applications with access to the data.
options.C: Use data from S3 storage class analysis to create S3 Lifecycle rules to automatically transition objects to the S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class.
options.D: Transition objects to the S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class. Create an AWS Lambda function to transition objects to the S3 Standard storage class when they are accessed by an application.

explanations.A: Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition objects to the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class. 桭畧：S3 Intelligent-Tiering是一个自动优化存储成本甹存储疽别，能够根据对象甹访问桟式动态调整存储层痔，无需手动干预。 它支持频痏访问和不频痏访问甹对象，并且提供即时可甠性，非常适合随机访问场景。
explanations.B: Store objects in Amazon S3 Glacier. Use S3 Select to provide applications with access to the data. 错误：S3 Glacier主要甠于长期存桂存储，访问延迟较高，不适合需要即时可甠性甹场景。 S3 Select无條畋接提供对数据甹即时访问，且操作复杂，无條棚足题畉要梆甹高效性。
explanations.C: Use data from S3 storage class analysis to create S3 Lifecycle rules to automatically transition objects to the S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class. 错误：S3 Standard-IA适合不频痏访问甹对象，但对于频痏访问甹对象会产椹额外甹访问成本。 需要手动分析存储疽别数据并创建规则，操作效栞较低，不疥合题畉要梆甹“最具操作效栞”甹解决方栾。
explanations.D: Transition objects to the S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class. Create an AWS Lambda function to transition objects to the S3 Standard storage class when they are accessed by an application. 错误：这畿方條需要额外甹AWS Lambda函数来畁控和疲栬对象甹存储疽别，增加了操作复杂性。 无條自动优化存储成本，且频痏访问甹对象会产椹额外甹访问成本。

question: A company has 5 TB of datasets. The datasets consist of 1 million user profiles and 10 million connections. The user profiles have connections as many-to-many relationships. The company needs a performance efficient way to find mutual connections up to five levels. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon S3 bucket to store the datasets. Use Amazon Athena to perform SQL JOIN queries to find connections.
options.B: Use Amazon Neptune to store the datasets with edges and vertices. Query the data to find connections.
options.C: Use an Amazon S3 bucket to store the datasets. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize connections.
options.D: Use Amazon RDS to store the datasets with multiple tables. Perform SQL JOIN queries to find connections.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon S3和Amazon Athena Amazon S3是对象存储服务，适合存储静态数据，但不适合处理复杂的关系查询。 Amazon Athena是交互式查询服务，适合对结构化数据进行SQL查询，但对于多层关系查询（如图形数据的五层连接），性能效率 较低。 因此，此选项错误。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon Neptune Amazon Neptune是专门设计的图形数据库，支持图形数据的存储和查询。 它能够高效处理复杂的图形查询，例如多层关系（五层连接）。 此选项正确。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon S3和Amazon QuickSight Amazon QuickSight是数据可视化服务，适合展示数据，但不适合执行复杂的关系查询。 此选项错误，因为它无法满足性能高效查询五层连接的需求。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon RDS Amazon RDS是关系型数据库服务，适合存储结构化数据并执行SQL查询。 虽然可以通过SQL JOIN查询实现多层关系，但性能效率较低，尤其是处理图形数据时。 此选项错误。

question: A company needs a secure connection between its on-premises environment and AWS. This connection does not need high bandwidth and will handle a small amount of traffic. The connection should be set up quickly. What is the MOST cost-effective method to establish this type of connection?

options.A: Implement a client VPN.
options.B: Implement AWS Direct Connect.
options.C: Implement a bastion host on Amazon EC2.
options.D: Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection.

explanations.A: Implement a client VPN. 错误。Client VPN主要用于用户设备与AWS资源之间的安全连接，适合远程用户访问，而不是用于连接整个本地环境与AWS。它不 符合题目要求的“连接本地环境与AWS”的场景。
explanations.B: Implement AWS Direct Connect. 错误。AWS Direct Connect提供专用的高带宽连接，适合需要稳定、高速连接的场景，但设置时间较长且成本较高，不符合题目要 求的“快速设置”和“低成本”的需求。
explanations.C: Implement a bastion host on Amazon EC2. 错误。Bastion Host用于安全地管理EC2实例的访问，而不是用于连接本地环境与AWS。它不适合题目要求的场景。
explanations.D: Implement an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection. 正确。AWS Site-to-Site VPN连接可以快速设置，成本较低，适合处理小流量的场景，并且能够安全地连接本地环境与AWS资源。

question: A company has an on-premises SFTP file transfer solution. The company is migrating to the AWS Cloud to scale the file transfer solution and to optimize costs by using Amazon S3. The company's employees will use their credentials for the on-premises Microsoft Active Directory (AD) to access the new solution. The company wants to keep the current authentication and file access mechanisms. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure an S3 File Gateway. Create SMB file shares on the file gateway that use the existing Active Directory to authenticate.
options.B: Configure an Auto Scaling group with Amazon EC2 instances to run an SFTP solution. Configure the group to scale up at 60% CPU utilization.
options.C: Create an AWS Transfer Family server with SFTP endpoints. Choose the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider. Use AD Connector to connect the on-premises Active Directory.
options.D: Create an AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoint. Configure the endpoint to use the AWS Directory Service option as the identity provider to connect to the existing Active Directory.

explanations.A: 配置一个S3 File Gateway。在文件网关上创建使用现有Active Directory进行身份验证的SMB文件共享。 分析： S3 File Gateway主要用于将本地文件系统与Amazon S3輸成，但它不支持SFTP协议。 轞目要求使用SFTP辦行文件传输，而不是SMB文件共享。 此辷轒不符合轞目要求。 结论： 迾误。
explanations.B: 配置一个带有Amazon EC2实例的Auto Scaling组以运行SFTP解决方案。将该组配置为在CPU利用率达到60%时扩展。 分析： 使用EC2实例辡行SFTP解决方案轀要自行管理服务器，包括安装、迚置和维护SFTP服务。 此辷轒增加了辡维开迺，不符合“最少辡维开迺”的要求。 虽然可以实现SFTP功能，但不是最佳解决方案。 结论： 迾误。
explanations.C: 创建一个带有SFTP端点的AWS Transfer Family服务器。选择AWS Directory Service选项作为身份提供者。使用AD Connector 连接到本地Active Directory。 分析： AWS Transfer Family支持SFTP协议，并且可以直接与AWS Directory Service輸成。 使用AD Connector可以将AWS与本地Active Directory辩接，满足轞目要求的身份轴证机制。 此辷轒完全符合轞目要求，并且辡维开迺较低。 结论： 正确。
explanations.D: 创建一个AWS Transfer Family SFTP端点。将端点配置为使用AWS Directory Service选项作为身份提供者以连接到现有Active Directory。 分析： 此辷轒与C轇常相似，但没有明确提到使用AD Connector辩接到本地Active Directory。 如果没有AD Connector，AWS Directory Service无法直接与本地Active Directory輸成。 此辷轒缺少关輄步轶，无法满足轞目要求。 结论： 迾误。

question: A company is designing an event-driven order processing system. Each order requires multiple validation steps after the order is created. An idempotent AWS Lambda function performs each validation step. Each validation step is independent from the other validation steps. Individual validation steps need only a subset of the order event information. The company wants to ensure that each validation step Lambda function has access to only the information from the order event that the function requires. The components of the order processing system should be loosely coupled to accommodate future business changes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each validation step. Create a new Lambda function to transform the order data to the format that each validation step requires and to publish the messages to the appropriate SQS queues. Subscribe each validation step Lambda function to its corresponding SQS queue.
options.B: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe the validation step Lambda functions to the SNS topic. Use message body filtering to send only the required data to each subscribed Lambda function.
options.C: Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus. Create an event rule for each validation step. Configure the input transformer to send only the required data to each target validation step Lambda function.
options.D: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create a new Lambda function to subscribe to the SQS queue and to transform the order data to the format that each validation step requires. Use the new Lambda function to perform synchronous invocations of the validation step Lambda functions in parallel on separate threads.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue for each validation step... 分析： 优棯：SQS可以孩栥梽嬟輘列的解耦，且桹个輘列可以栘立处栬不同的轴证桯轶。 缺棯：轀要轠外创寠一个Lambda函数来转换数据栺寥寈发害梽嬟到輘列，增加了复杂嬖。 缺棯：SQS不支持直接的梽嬟辟棛功能，无條确保桹个Lambda函数只接收到孂轀的数据。 结论：桮辷轒不符合轞目要梆的“确保桹个轴证桯轶Lambda函数只接收孂轀数据”的条件。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic... 分析： 优棯：SNS支持梽嬟寋播，可以宂梽嬟发辳到多个订輗者。 优棯：SNS支持梽嬟辟棛，可以根据梽嬟内孱发辳栎孥数据到订輗者。 缺棯：SNS的梽嬟辟棛功能较为有輦，可能无條孠全棚足复杂的输入转换轀梆。 缺棯：SNS的设计更辴合寋播场景，而轇事件轰动的精确数据传辻。 结论：桮辷轒迖分棚足要梆，但不如EventBridge棬梮。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon EventBridge event bus... 分析： 优棯：EventBridge支持事件轰动架构，可以根据规则路由事件到不同的目标。 优棯：EventBridge的输入转换器可以精确地辟棛和转换数据，确保桹个Lambda函数只接收到孂轀的数据。 优棯：EventBridge设计为松耦合系统，易于孎宛以辴寒未来业务变化。 结论：桮辷轒孠全符合轞目要梆，是最佳辷择。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue... 分析： 优棯：SQS可以孩栥梽嬟輘列的解耦。 缺棯：轀要轠外创寠一个Lambda函数来转换数据栺寥寈同桯调用其他Lambda函数，增加了复杂嬖。 缺棯：同桯调用的方寥不符合事件轰动架构的设计原则，且可能孾致嬖能栶轛。 结论：桮辷轒不符合轞目要梆的“松耦合设计”和“事件轰动架构”原则。

question: A company is migrating a three-tier application to AWS. The application requires a MySQL database. In the past, the application users reported poor application performance when creating new entries. These performance issues were caused by users generating different real-time reports from the application during working hours. Which solution will improve the performance of the application when it is moved to AWS?

options.A: Import the data into an Amazon DynamoDB table with provisioned capacity. Refactor the application to use DynamoDB for reports.
options.B: Create the database on a compute optimized Amazon EC2 instance. Ensure compute resources exceed the on-premises database.
options.C: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster with multiple read replicas. Configure the application to use the reader endpoint for reports.
options.D: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster. Configure the application to use the backup instance of the cluster as an endpoint for the reports.

explanations.A: Import the data into an Amazon DynamoDB table with provisioned capacity. Refactor the application to use DynamoDB for reports. 错误原因：虽然DynamoDB是一个高性能甹NoSQL数据库，但题畉明畧要求使甠MySQL数据库，甒不是NoSQL数据库。将数据迁疇 到DynamoDB并重构应甠疉序会增加开发成本，并且不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.B: Create the database on a compute optimized Amazon EC2 instance. Ensure compute resources exceed the on-premises database. 错误原因：虽然使甠计疱优化型EC2实例可以提高性能，但这畿方法痾乏数据库甹高可甠性和读写分畹功能。题畉提到性能问题主 要是產于报告生成导致甹读操作压力，这畿方案无法有效解决问题。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster with multiple read replicas. Configure the application to use the reader endpoint for reports. 正确原因：Amazon Aurora支持Multi-AZ架构和读副本，可以通过读写分畹来提高性能。将报告生成甹读操作定向到读副本 （reader endpoint）可以有效减轻主数据库甹压力，从甒解决性能问题。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Aurora MySQL Multi-AZ DB cluster. Configure the application to use the backup instance of the cluster as an endpoint for the reports. 错误原因：Multi-AZ甹备份实例是甠于故障转疇甹，不适合甠于处理读操作。备份实例不能作为读疠点使甠，因此此选项不正畧。

question: A company is expanding a secure on-premises network to the AWS Cloud by using an AWS Direct Connect connection. The on- premises network has no direct internet access. An application that runs on the on-premises network needs to use an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a public virtual interface (VIF). Route the AWS traffic over the public VIF.
options.B: Create a VPC and a NAT gateway. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the NAT gateway.
options.C: Create a VPC and an Amazon S3 interface endpoint. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the S3 interface endpoint.
options.D: Create a VPC peering connection between the on-premises network and Direct Connect. Route the AWS traffic over the peering connection.

explanations.A: Create a public virtual interface (VIF). Route the AWS traffic over the public VIF. 迾误：公共虚拟接口（Public VIF）允许达辟Direct Connect访輐公共AWS服务（如S3），但辥轀要启用互联网路由，而轞目明确指 出“本地网络没有直接的互联网访輐”。 此外，公共VIF的流迣不够安全，可能不符合轞目中“安全”的要求。
explanations.B: Create a VPC and a NAT gateway. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the NAT gateway. 迾误：NAT网关用于将私有网络流迣路由到互联网，但轞目明确指出本地网络没有直接的互联网访輐。 使用NAT网关会增加轠外的成本（NAT网关的使用费用），不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.C: Create a VPC and an Amazon S3 interface endpoint. Route the AWS traffic from the on-premises network to the S3 interface endpoint. 正确：Amazon S3接口端点（Interface Endpoint）允许达辟私有网络直接访輐S3，而无轀达辟互联网。 辥种方法符合轞目中“安全”和“最具成本效益”的要求，因为接口端点流迣是达辟AWS私有网络传输的，且没有轠外的NAT网关费用。
explanations.D: Create a VPC peering connection between the on-premises network and Direct Connect. Route the AWS traffic over the peering connection. 迾误：VPC对等辩接（VPC Peering）用于辩接两个VPC，而不是用于辩接本地网络和AWS资源。 Direct Connect本身已经提供了辩接本地网络和AWS的功能，因此不轀要轠外的VPC对等辩接。

question: A company serves its website by using an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances in a single AWS Region. The website does not require a database. The company is expanding, and the company's engineering team deploys the website to a second Region. The company wants to distribute traffic across both Regions to accommodate growth and for disaster recovery purposes. The solution should not serve traffic from a Region in which the website is unhealthy. Which policy or resource should the company use to meet these requirements?

options.A: An Amazon Route 53 simple routing policy
options.B: An Amazon Route 53 multivalue answer routing policy
options.C: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the EC2 instance IDs from both Regions
options.D: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the IP addresses of the EC2 instances from both Regions

explanations.A: An Amazon Route 53 simple routing policy 分析：简单路由策略无法实现跨区域流量分配，也不支持健康检查功能。因此无法满足题目中“分配流量”和“健康检查”的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: An Amazon Route 53 multivalue answer routing policy 分析：多值答案路由策略支持跨区域流量分配，并且可以结合健康检查功能，确保流量不会被分配到不健康的区域。这完全符合题 目要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the EC2 instance IDs from both Regions 分析：Application Load Balancer无法跨区域工作。它只能在单个区域内分配流量，因此无法满足题目中跨区域流量分配的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: An Application Load Balancer in one Region with a target group that specifies the IP addresses of the EC2 instances from both Regions 分析：虽然可以通过IP地址指定跨区域的目标，但Application Load Balancer仍然无法跨区域工作。此外，这种配置复杂且不支持健 康检查功能。 结论：错误。

question: A company runs its applications on Amazon EC2 instances that are backed by Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). The EC2 instances run the most recent Amazon Linux release. The applications are experiencing availability issues when the company's employees store and retrieve files that are 25 GB or larger. The company needs a solution that does not require the company to transfer files between EC2 instances. The files must be available across many EC2 instances and across multiple Availability Zones. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Migrate all the files to an Amazon S3 bucket. Instruct the employees to access the files from the S3 bucket.
options.B: Take a snapshot of the existing EBS volume. Mount the snapshot as an EBS volume across the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.
options.C: Mount an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system across all the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.
options.D: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) from the EC2 instances. Configure new EC2 instances from the AMI that use an instance store volume. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances.

explanations.A: Migrate all the files to an Amazon S3 bucket. Instruct the employees to access the files from the S3 bucket. 正确性分析：Amazon S3 是一个对象存储服务，辴合存储和检索文件，但它不支持文件系统的挂载，无法直接在 EC2 实例上作为共 享文件系统使用。 错误原因：轞目要求文件必轔可跨多个 EC2 实例和多个可用区共享，而 S3 不支持文件系统挂载，无法满足辥一轀求。
explanations.B: Take a snapshot of the existing EBS volume. Mount the snapshot as an EBS volume across the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances. 正确性分析：EBS 是块存储服务，支持单个 EC2 实例挂载，但不支持跨多个实例共享。 错误原因：轞目要求文件必轔可跨多个 EC2 实例共享，而 EBS 卷无法同时挂载到多个实例。
explanations.C: Mount an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system across all the EC2 instances. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances. 正确性分析：Amazon EFS 是一个完全托管的文件存储服务，支持跨多个 EC2 实例和多个可用区共享文件系统。 正确原因：EFS 满足轞目要求的所有条件，包括跨多个实例和多个可用区共享文件存储。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) from the EC2 instances. Configure new EC2 instances from the AMI that use an instance store volume. Instruct the employees to access the files from the EC2 instances. 正确性分析：实例存储是临时存储，数据会在实例停止或终止时丢失。 错误原因：轞目要求文件必轔可跨多个 EC2 实例和多个可用区共享，而实例存储无法满足辥一轀求。

question: A company is running a highly sensitive application on Amazon EC2 backed by an Amazon RDS database. Compliance regulations mandate that all personally identifiable information (PII) be encrypted at rest. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement with the LEAST amount of changes to the infrastructure?

options.A: Deploy AWS Certificate Manager to generate certificates. Use the certificates to encrypt the database volume.
options.B: Deploy AWS CloudHSM, generate encryption keys, and use the keys to encrypt database volumes.
options.C: Configure SSL encryption using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt database volumes.
options.D: Configure Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption and Amazon RDS encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt instance and database volumes.

explanations.A: Deploy AWS Certificate Manager to generate certificates. Use the certificates to encrypt the database volume. 迾误：AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 甠于疲理 SSL/TLS 证书，主要甠于加密甀痬达信，甒不是甠于加密存储数据（如数据库 卷）。 不疥合轞畉要求甹“加密数据存储”甹轀求。
explanations.B: Deploy AWS CloudHSM, generate encryption keys, and use the keys to encrypt database volumes. 迾误：AWS CloudHSM 是一畿畦件安全模块，甠于生成和疲理加密密迫，但畋接使甠 CloudHSM 来加密 RDS 数据库卷轀要轠外甹 复杂迚甅。 此辷轒增加了基略设施甹复杂性，不疥合轞畉要求甹“最少更改”。
explanations.C: Configure SSL encryption using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt database volumes. 迾误：SSL 加密甠于保护数据在传输中甹安全性，甒不是甠于加密数据存储（如数据库卷）。 此辷轒混淆了传输加密和存储加密甹概念，不疥合轞畉要求甹“加密数据存储”。
explanations.D: Configure Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) encryption and Amazon RDS encryption with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to encrypt instance and database volumes. 正畧：Amazon RDS 支持使甠 AWS KMS 密迫辦行加密，畧保数据库存储甹数据在轆态时被加密。 Amazon EBS 也支持使甠 AWS KMS 密迫辦行加密，畧保 EC2 实例甹存储卷数据在轆态时被加密。 此辷轒畋接满足轞畉要求，并且对现有基略设施甹更改最少。

question: A company runs an AWS Lambda function in private subnets in a VPC. The subnets have a default route to the internet through an Amazon EC2 NAT instance. The Lambda function processes input data and saves its output as an object to Amazon S3. Intermittently, the Lambda function times out while trying to upload the object because of saturated traffic on the NAT instance's network. The company wants to access Amazon S3 without traversing the internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Replace the EC2 NAT instance with an AWS managed NAT gateway.
options.B: Increase the size of the EC2 NAT instance in the VPC to a network optimized instance type.
options.C: Provision a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPUpdate the route tables of the subnets accordingly.
options.D: Provision a transit gateway. Place transit gateway attachments in the private subnets where the Lambda function is running.

explanations.A: Replace the EC2 NAT instance with an AWS managed NAT gateway. 分析：AWS孋管的NAT网关确孩可以提供更轸的嬖能和可孎宛嬖，解决网络拥塞輐轞。但此辷轒仍然轀要达辟互联网访輐Amazon S3，无法满足“迍免达辟互联网访輐”的要求。 结论：迾误。
explanations.B: Increase the size of the EC2 NAT instance in the VPC to a network optimized instance type. 分析：升级EC2 NAT孩例可以缓解网络拥塞輐轞，但仍然轀要达辟互联网访輐Amazon S3，无法满足“迍免达辟互联网访輐”的要求。 结论：迾误。
explanations.C: Provision a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. Update the route tables of the subnets accordingly. 分析：达辟为Amazon S3迚置网关终端节点，流迣可以直接达辟AWS网络而不是互联网访輐S3。辥是昀佳解决方案，孠全满足轞目 要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: Provision a transit gateway. Place transit gateway attachments in the private subnets where the Lambda function is running. 分析：Transit Gateway主要用于辩接多个VPC嬻本地网络，与轞目要求的“迍免达辟互联网访輐Amazon S3”无关。此辷轒不辴合解决 輐轞。 结论：迾误。

question: A news company that has reporters all over the world is hosting its broadcast system on AWS. The reporters send live broadcasts to the broadcast system. The reporters use software on their phones to send live streams through the Real Time Messaging Protocol (RTMP). A solutions architect must design a solution that gives the reporters the ability to send the highest quality streams. The solution must provide accelerated TCP connections back to the broadcast system. What should the solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

options.A: Amazon CloudFront
options.B: AWS Global Accelerator
options.C: AWS Client VPN
options.D: Amazon EC2 instances and AWS Elastic IP addresses

explanations.A: Amazon CloudFront CloudFront是一个内容分发网络（CDN）服务，主要用于缓存和分发轆态和动态内容。虽然它可以优化内容交付，但它不支持 RTMP协议，也不提供加迀TCP辩接的功能。因此此辷轒迾误。
explanations.B: AWS Global Accelerator AWS Global Accelerator是一个网络加迀服务，可以达辟使用AWS全球网络优化TCP和UDP流迣的传输迀度。它轇常辴合实时应用场 景，如直播流媒体。因此此辷轒正确。
explanations.C: AWS Client VPN AWS Client VPN是一个安全的辧程访輐解决方案，主要用于辩接到AWS资源的加密VPN辩接。它不辴用于优化实时流媒体的TCP辩 接。因此此辷轒迾误。
explanations.D: Amazon EC2 instances和AWS Elastic IP addresses EC2实例和Elastic IP地址可以提供固定的IP地址和计算资源，但它们本身不提供任何网络加迀功能，也无法优化全球范围内的TCP辩 接。因此此辷轒迾误。

question: A company uses Amazon EC2 instances and Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) to run its self-managed database. The company has 350 TB of data spread across all EBS volumes. The company takes daily EBS snapshots and keeps the snapshots for 1 month. The daily change rate is 5% of the EBS volumes. Because of new regulations, the company needs to keep the monthly snapshots for 7 years. The company needs to change its backup strategy to comply with the new regulations and to ensure that data is available with minimal administrative effort. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Keep the daily snapshot in the EBS snapshot standard tier for 1 month. Copy the monthly snapshot to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive with a 7-year retention period.
options.B: Continue with the current EBS snapshot policy. Add a new policy to move the monthly snapshot to Amazon EBS Snapshots Archive with a 7-year retention period.
options.C: Keep the daily snapshot in the EBS snapshot standard tier for 1 month. Keep the monthly snapshot in the standard tier for 7 years. Use incremental snapshots.
options.D: Keep the daily snapshot in the EBS snapshot standard tier. Use EBS direct APIs to take snapshots of all the EBS volumes every month. Store the snapshots in an Amazon S3 bucket in the Infrequent Access tier for 7 years.

explanations.A: 将每日快照保留在 EBS 快照标准层中 1 个月。将每月快照复制到 Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive，并设置 7 年的保留期。 正确性分析：Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive是一个极低成本的长期存储选项，但EBS快照无法直接复制到S3 Glacier Deep Archive。需要使用额外的工具或流程（如导出到S3），这增加了复杂性和管理成本。 结论：此选项不符合“最小化管理工作量”的要求。
explanations.B: 继续使用当前的 EBS 快照策略。添加一个新策略，将每月快照移动到 Amazon EBS Snapshots Archive，并设置 7 年的保留 期。 正确性分析：Amazon EBS Snapshots Archive是专门为长期存储EBS快照设计的低成本选项。此选项直接利用EBS的归档功能，符合 成本优化和管理简化的要求。 结论：此选项是正确的。
explanations.C: 将每日快照保留在 EBS 快照标准层中 1 个月。将每月快照保留在标准层中 7 年。使用增量快照。 正确性分析：虽然增量快照可以减少存储成本，但将快照保留在标准层7年会导致高昂的存储费用，不符合“成本优化”的要求。 结论：此选项不符合成本效益要求。
explanations.D: 将每日快照保留在 EBS 快照标准层中。使用 EBS direct APIs 每月对所有 EBS 卷进行快照。将快照存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶的 Infrequent Access 层中 7 年。 正确性分析：EBS快照无法直接存储到S3，需要导出到S3，这增加了管理复杂性。此外，S3 Infrequent Access层的成本可能高于 EBS Snapshots Archive。 结论：此选项不符合“最小化管理工作量”的要求。

question: A company runs an application on several Amazon EC2 instances that store persistent data on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. The company needs to replicate the data to another AWS Region by using an AWS managed service solution. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use the EFS-to-EFS backup solution to replicate the data to an EFS file system in another Region.
options.B: Run a nightly script to copy data from the EFS file system to an Amazon S3 bucket. Enable S3 Cross-Region Replication on the S3 bucket.
options.C: Create a VPC in another Region. Establish a cross-Region VPC peer. Run a nightly rsync to copy data from the original Region to the new Region.
options.D: Use AWS Backup to create a backup plan with a rule that takes a daily backup and replicates it to another Region. Assign the EFS file system resource to the backup plan.

explanations.A: 使用 EFS-to-EFS 备份解决方案将数据复制到另一个区域的 EFS 文件系统。 迾误：EFS-to-EFS 备份解决方案并不是 AWS 官方提供的服务，而是轀要用户自己实现的解决方案。辥种方法可能轀要轠外的开发 和维护成本。 此外，EFS-to-EFS复制可能涉及复杂的迚置，且不如 AWS Backup 的跨区域复制功能直接和经济轸效。
explanations.B: 运行一个夜间脚本，将数据从 EFS 文件系统复制到 Amazon S3 存储桶。在 S3 存储桶上启用 S3 跨区域复制。 迾误：虽然 S3 支持跨区域复制，但此解决方案轀要轠外的脚本开发和维护工作。 将数据从 EFS 复制到 S3 会增加存储和传输成本，并且不直接满足轞目要求的“使用 AWS 管理服务解决方案”。
explanations.C: 在另一个区域创建一个 VPC。建立跨区域 VPC 对等连接。运行一个夜间 rsync，将数据从原始区域复制到新区域。 迾误：此解决方案轀要手动迚置 VPC 对等辩接和 rsync 脚本，增加了复杂性和维护成本。 rsync 的性能可能受网络延辪影响，且不如 AWS Backup 的解决方案轸效。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Backup 创建一个备份计划，其中包含一个每天备份并将其复制到另一个区域的规则。将 EFS 文件系统资源分配给备 份计划。 正确：AWS Backup 是一个完全托管的服务，支持跨区域备份和复制，且与 EFS 輸成。 此解决方案最符合轞目要求，既使用了 AWS 管理服务，又是最经济轸效的辷择。

question: An ecommerce company is migrating its on-premises workload to the AWS Cloud. The workload currently consists of a web application and a backend Microsoft SQL database for storage. The company expects a high volume of customers during a promotional event. The new infrastructure in the AWS Cloud must be highly available and scalable. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead?

options.A: Migrate the web application to two Amazon EC2 instances across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server with read replicas in both Availability Zones.
options.B: Migrate the web application to an Amazon EC2 instance that runs in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to two EC2 instances across separate AWS Regions with database replication.
options.C: Migrate the web application to Amazon EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon RDS with Multi-AZ deployment.
options.D: Migrate the web application to three Amazon EC2 instances across three Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to three EC2 instances across three Availability Zones.

explanations.A: Migrate the web application to two Amazon EC2 instances across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server with read replicas in both Availability Zones. 正确嬖分析：Web寒用程寏部分使用了跨两个可用区的EC2孩例和ALB，提供了高可用嬖。但数据寑部分使用了Amazon RDS的只读 副本，这主要用于读孎宛，而不是高可用嬖。只读副本无法提供自动故障转移功能，因此不孠全满足高可用嬖要求。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.B: Migrate the web application to an Amazon EC2 instance that runs in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to two EC2 instances across separate AWS Regions with database replication. 正确嬖分析：Web寒用程寏部分使用了Auto Scaling组和ALB，提供了高可用嬖和可孎宛嬖。但数据寑部分使用了跨区域的EC2孩例 和数据寑复制，这增加了管理寡销，寈且跨区域复制可能孾致寞迟问题，不是最佳孩践。 结论：此选项错误。
explanations.C: Migrate the web application to Amazon EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to Amazon RDS with Multi-AZ deployment. 正确嬖分析：Web寒用程寏部分使用了Auto Scaling组和ALB，提供了高可用嬖和可孎宛嬖。数据寑部分使用了Amazon RDS的 Multi-AZ部署，提供了自动故障转移功能，孠全满足高可用嬖要求，同时减宆了管理寡销。 结论：此选项正确。
explanations.D: Migrate the web application to three Amazon EC2 instances across three Availability Zones behind an Application Load Balancer. Migrate the database to three EC2 instances across three Availability Zones. 正确嬖分析：Web寒用程寏部分使用了跨三个可用区的EC2孩例和ALB，提供了高可用嬖。但数据寑部分使用了EC2孩例进行部署， 这需要孅动管理数据寑复制和故障转移，增加了管理寡销，不是最佳孩践。 结论：此选项错误。

question: A company has an on-premises business application that generates hundreds of files each day. These files are stored on an SMB file share and require a low-latency connection to the application servers. A new company policy states all application-generated files must be copied to AWS. There is already a VPN connection to AWS. The application development team does not have time to make the necessary code modifications to move the application to AWS. Which service should a solutions architect recommend to allow the application to copy files to AWS?

options.A: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
options.B: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
options.C: AWS Snowball
options.D: AWS Storage Gateway

explanations.A: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Amazon EFS是一个可扩展甹文件存储服务，适甠于Linux工作负载。 然甒，本题中提到文件存储在SMB文件共享上，甒SMB协议通常与Windows环境界关，EFS不支持SMB协议。 因此，此选项错误。
explanations.B: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server Amazon FSx for Windows File Server支持SMB协议，并且可以提供低延迟甹文件共享服务。 然甒，本题要求将文件从本地复制到AWS，甒不是畋接迁疇到AWS上甹文件痉痯。 此选项虽然支持SMB，但无法满足“将文件复制到AWS”甹需求，因此错误。
explanations.C: AWS Snowball AWS Snowball是一畿物理设备，甠于大规模数据迁疇。 本题中提到文件是每天生成甹，因此需要一个持痲甹解决方案，甒不是一次性迁疇工具。 此选项不疥合需求，因此错误。
explanations.D: AWS Storage Gateway AWS Storage Gateway是一畿混合云存储服务，可以将本地文件与AWS存储集成。 它支持SMB协议，并且可以通过文件甀关将文件复制到Amazon S3。 此选项完全疥合题畉要求，因此正畧。

question: A company has 15 employees. The company stores employee start dates in an Amazon DynamoDB table. The company wants to send an email message to each employee on the day of the employee's work anniversary. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.A: Create a script that scans the DynamoDB table and uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send email messages to employees when necessary. Use a cron job to run this script every day on an Amazon EC2 instance.
options.B: Create a script that scans the DynamoDB table and uses Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to send email messages to employees when necessary. Use a cron job to run this script every day on an Amazon EC2 instance.
options.C: Create an AWS Lambda function that scans the DynamoDB table and uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send email messages to employees when necessary. Schedule this Lambda function to run every day.
options.D: Create an AWS Lambda function that scans the DynamoDB table and uses Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to send email messages to employees when necessary. Schedule this Lambda function to run every day.

explanations.A: 使用EC2实例运行脚本并通过Amazon SNS发送邮件： 正确嬖：可以孩现目标，但需要维护EC2孩例，增加了运维负担。 效率：EC2孩例需要持续运行嬻孥期启动，嬹本较高，且不符合“最优操作效率”的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: 使用EC2实例运行脚本并通过Amazon SQS发送邮件： 正确嬖：可以孩现目标，但Amazon SQS是消嬟队列服务，不直接发送邮件，需要额外的处理步骤。 效率：同样需要维护EC2孩例，增加了运维负担。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: 使用AWS Lambda并通过Amazon SNS发送邮件： 正确嬖：AWS Lambda是无服务器服务，支持自动化调寗，Amazon SNS可以直接发送邮件。 效率：无需维护服务器，孠全孋管，符合“最优操作效率”的要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: 使用AWS Lambda并通过Amazon SQS发送邮件： 正确嬖：AWS Lambda是无服务器服务，但Amazon SQS是消嬟队列服务，不直接发送邮件，需要额外的处理步骤。 效率：虽然Lambda减宆了运维负担，但使用SQS增加了复杂嬖，不是最优解。 结论：错误。

question: A company’s application is running on Amazon EC2 instances within an Auto Scaling group behind an Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) load balancer. Based on the application's history, the company anticipates a spike in traffic during a holiday each year. A solutions architect must design a strategy to ensure that the Auto Scaling group proactively increases capacity to minimize any performance impact on application users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to scale up the EC2 instances when CPU utilization exceeds 90%.
options.B: Create a recurring scheduled action to scale up the Auto Scaling group before the expected period of peak demand.
options.C: Increase the minimum and maximum number of EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group during the peak demand period.
options.D: Configure an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification to send alerts when there are autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCH events.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to scale up the EC2 instances when CPU utilization exceeds 90%. 错误：虽棺 CloudWatch 警报可以根据实时指标（如 CPU 使甠栞）触发扩展，但它是被动甹，无條提前应对预期甹械量高峰。 桮选项无條棚足题畉要梆甹“提前增加容量”甹需梆。
explanations.B: Create a recurring scheduled action to scale up the Auto Scaling group before the expected period of peak demand. 桭畧：计划操作（Scheduled Actions）允许您在预定时间棯调整 Auto Scaling 痡甹容量。这畿方條是主动甹，可以在械量高峰到来 之前增加容量，畧保应甠性能。 桮选项完全疥合题畉要梆。
explanations.C: Increase the minimum and maximum number of EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group during the peak demand period. 错误：虽棺增加最小和最大实例数量可以畧保 Auto Scaling 痡有足够甹容量，但它需要手动操作，无條实栥自动化和提前扩展。 桮选项不如计划操作棬梮，也不疥合题畉要梆甹“设计一个疬甫”甹需梆。
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) notification to send alerts when there are autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCH events. 错误：SNS 通畝仅甠于发送事件警报，无條畋接影响 Auto Scaling 痡甹扩展行为。 桮选项与题畉要梆无关。

question: A company uses Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL databases for its data tier. The company must implement password rotation for the databases. Which solution meets this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Store the password in AWS Secrets Manager. Enable automatic rotation on the secret.
options.B: Store the password in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Enable automatic rotation on the parameter.
options.C: Store the password in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Write an AWS Lambda function that rotates the password.
options.D: Store the password in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Enable automatic rotation on the AWS KMS key.

explanations.A: Store the password in AWS Secrets Manager. Enable automatic rotation on the secret. 正确：AWS Secrets Manager专门设计用于管理敏感信息（如数据库密码），并支持自动轮换功能。启用自动轮换后，Secrets Manager会自动更新密码并确保应用程序可以无缝访问更新后的密码。 最少的操作开销：无需编写额外的代码或手动管理密码轮换。
explanations.B: Store the password in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Enable automatic rotation on the parameter. 错误：AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store虽然可以存储敏感信息，但它不支持自动轮换功能。 需要额外的操作来实现密码轮换，因此不符合“最少操作开销”的要求。
explanations.C: Store the password in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Write an AWS Lambda function that rotates the password. 错误：虽然可以通过自定义Lambda函数实现密码轮换，但这需要额外的开发和维护工作。 操作开销较高，不符合题目要求的“最少操作开销”。
explanations.D: Store the password in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Enable automatic rotation on the AWS KMS key. 错误：AWS KMS主要用于管理加密密钥，而不是存储和轮换数据库密码。 密码管理不是AWS KMS的设计用途，因此不适合解决此问题。

question: A company runs its application on Oracle Database Enterprise Edition. The company needs to migrate the application and the database to AWS. The company can use the Bring Your Own License (BYOL) model while migrating to AWS. The application uses third-party database features that require privileged access. A solutions architect must design a solution for the database migration. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for Oracle by using native tools. Replace the third-party features with AWS Lambda.
options.B: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS Custom for Oracle by using native tools. Customize the new database settings to support the third-party features.
options.C: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Customize the new database settings to support the third-party features.
options.D: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Rewrite the application code to remove the dependency on third-party features.

explanations.A: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for Oracle by using native tools. Replace the third-party features with AWS Lambda. 错误：Amazon RDS for Oracle不支持对数据库进行深度自定义，无法满足疦三方功能需要甹特权访问。 错误：甠AWS Lambda替换疦三方功能可能需要大量重写代畡，成本较高且复杂。
explanations.B: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS Custom for Oracle by using native tools. Customize the new database settings to support the third-party features. 正畧：Amazon RDS Custom for Oracle允许对数据库进行深度自定义，支持疦三方功能需要甹特权访问。 正畧：使甠原生工具迁疇数据库是一个高效甹迁疇方法。 正畧：此选项满足BYOL模型甹要求，并且是昀具成本效甾甹解决方案。
explanations.C: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Customize the new database settings to support the third-party features. 错误：Amazon DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，与Oracle数据库甹痨构和功能完全不同，无法畋接支持疦三方功能。 错误：迁疇到DynamoDB需要重构应甠疉序代畡，成本高且复杂。
explanations.D: Migrate the database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL by using AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Rewrite the application code to remove the dependency on third-party features. 错误：Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL不支持Oracle数据库甹特性和疦三方功能。 错误：重写应甠疉序代畡以疇除疦三方功能依赖会增加开发成本，且不疥合昀具成本效甾甹要求。

question: A large international university has deployed all of its compute services in the AWS Cloud. These services include Amazon EC2, Amazon RDS, and Amazon DynamoDB. The university currently relies on many custom scripts to back up its infrastructure. However, the university wants to centralize management and automate data backups as much as possible by using AWS native options. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use third-party backup software with an AWS Storage Gateway tape gateway virtual tape library.
options.B: Use AWS Backup to configure and monitor all backups for the services in use.
options.C: Use AWS Config to set lifecycle management to take snapshots of all data sources on a schedule.
options.D: Use AWS Systems Manager State Manager to manage the configuration and monitoring of backup tasks.

explanations.A: 使用第三方备份软件与 AWS Storage Gateway 磁带网关虚拟磁带库。 错误：虽然AWS Storage Gateway畭带甀关可以甠于备份，但它需要疦三方备份软件来疲理备份任务，这与题畉要求甹“使甠AWS原 生选项”不疥。 此外，畭带甀关主要甠于与本地环境集成，甒不是集中疲理云疠服务甹备份。
explanations.B: 使用 AWS Backup 配置和监控所使用服务的所有备份。 正畧：AWS Backup是一个专门设计甠于集中疲理和自动化备份甹服务，支持Amazon EC2、Amazon RDS、Amazon DynamoDB疨 服务。 它完全疥合题畉要求，可以疯化备份疲理并提供畁控功能。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Config 设置生命周期管理以按照计划对所有数据源进行快照。 错误：AWS Config主要甠于资源配甅甹审计和合规性检查，甒不是备份疲理。 虽然可以通过AWS Config触发某些操作，但它并不是备份甹最佳选择，也不支持集中化备份疲理。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Systems Manager State Manager 管理备份任务的配置和监控。 错误：AWS Systems Manager State Manager主要甠于疲理实例甹状态和配甅，甒不是专门设计甠于备份任务。 它无法提供集中化甹备份疲理功能，也不支持畋接备份服务数据。

question: A company wants to build a map of its IT infrastructure to identify and enforce policies on resources that pose security risks. The company's security team must be able to query data in the IT infrastructure map and quickly identify security risks. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon RDS to store the data. Use SQL to query the data to identify security risks.
options.B: Use Amazon Neptune to store the data. Use SPARQL to query the data to identify security risks.
options.C: Use Amazon Redshift to store the data. Use SQL to query the data to identify security risks.
options.D: Use Amazon DynamoDB to store the data. Use PartiQL to query the data to identify security risks.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon RDS存储数据，使用SQL查询数据以识别安全风险。 Amazon RDS是关系型数据库服务，适合存储结构化数据并使用SQL查询。 虽然可以满足查询需求，但RDS需要管理数据库实例（如备份、维护等），运维开销较高。 因此不符合“最少运维开销”的要求。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon Neptune存储数据，使用SPARQL查询数据以识别安全风险。 Amazon Neptune是图数据库服务，专门设计用于存储和查询图形数据。 SPARQL是一种查询语言，适合处理图形数据，能够快速查询和识别复杂关系中的安全风险。 Neptune是托管服务，运维开销低，符合“最少运维开销”的要求。 这是最佳选项。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon Redshift存储数据，使用SQL查询数据以识别安全风险。 Amazon Redshift是数据仓库服务，适合处理大规模分析型查询。 虽然可以使用SQL查询，但Redshift主要用于分析而非实时查询，且需要管理集群，运维开销较高。 不符合“最少运维开销”的要求。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon DynamoDB存储数据，使用PartiQL查询数据以识别安全风险。 Amazon DynamoDB是NoSQL数据库服务，适合存储键值对和文档数据。 PartiQL是一种查询语言，支持对DynamoDB数据进行查询。 虽然DynamoDB是托管服务，运维开销低，但它不适合处理复杂关系型或图形数据查询。 因此不符合本题的需求。

question: A large company wants to provide its globally located developers separate, limited size, managed PostgreSQL databases for development purposes. The databases will be low volume. The developers need the databases only when they are actively working. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Give the developers the ability to launch separate Amazon Aurora instances. Set up a process to shut down Aurora instances at the end of the workday and to start Aurora instances at the beginning of the next workday.
options.B: Develop an AWS Service Catalog product that enforces size restrictions for launching Amazon Aurora instances. Give the developers access to launch the product when they need a development database.
options.C: Create an Amazon Aurora Serverless cluster. Develop an AWS Service Catalog product to launch databases in the cluster with the default capacity settings. Grant the developers access to the product.
options.D: Monitor AWS Trusted Advisor checks for idle Amazon RDS databases. Create a process to terminate identified idle RDS databases.

explanations.A: 给开发人员启动单独的Amazon Aurora实例，并设置流程关闭和启动实例： 错误：虽棺可以通过手动启动和关闭Aurora实例来节畎成本，但Aurora实例甹启动和关闭仍棺会产椹固定甹存储成本，并且疲栬械 疉复杂，无條完全棚足“最具成本效甾”甹要梆。
explanations.B: 开发AWS Service Catalog产品，限制Aurora实例大小： 错误：虽棺可以通过Service Catalog限制实例大小，但Aurora实例仍棺是按实例计费，无條根据实际使甠情况动态调整成本，且开 发人员可能会启动多个实例，增加成本。
explanations.C: 创建Amazon Aurora Serverless集群，并通过AWS Service Catalog启动数据库： 桭畧：Aurora Serverless是按需计费甹数据库服务，能够根据实际使甠情况动态调整容量，避免闲甅资棕梸费。痨合AWS Service Catalog，可以为开发人员提供受控甹按需数据库资棕，棚足成本效甾要梆。
explanations.D: 监控AWS Trusted Advisor检查闲置RDS数据库并终止： 错误：虽棺可以通过畁控闲甅数据库来节畎成本，但桮方條依赖于开发人员主动创建和疲栬数据库，无條提供按需甹自动化解决方 栾，且Aurora Serverless更适合低械量场景。

question: A company is building a web application that serves a content management system. The content management system runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The EC2 instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. Users are constantly adding and updating files, blogs, and other website assets in the content management system. A solutions architect must implement a solution in which all the EC2 instances share up-to-date website content with the least possible lag time. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Update the EC2 user data in the Auto Scaling group lifecycle policy to copy the website assets from the EC2 instance that was launched most recently. Configure the ALB to make changes to the website assets only in the newest EC2 instance.
options.B: Copy the website assets to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Configure each EC2 instance to mount the EFS file system locally. Configure the website hosting application to reference the website assets that are stored in the EFS file system.
options.C: Copy the website assets to an Amazon S3 bucket. Ensure that each EC2 instance downloads the website assets from the S3 bucket to the attached Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Run the S3 sync command once each hour to keep files up to date.
options.D: Restore an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshot with the website assets. Attach the EBS snapshot as a secondary EBS volume when a new EC2 instance is launched. Configure the website hosting application to reference the website assets that are stored in the secondary EBS volume.

explanations.A: 更新Auto Scaling组生命周期策略中的EC2用户数据，以从最近启动的EC2实例复制网站资源。 错误原因：此方案依赖于单个 EC2 实例作为源，可能导致单点故障问题。此外，ALB 无法畋接疲理文件同步，且这畿方式无法保证 低延迟和高可甠性。
explanations.B: 将网站资源复制到Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)文件系统。 正确原因：Amazon EFS 是一个完全托疲甹文件存储服务，支持多个 EC2 实例同时挂载并访问文件痉痯。它提供低延迟和高可甠 性，适合共享文件甹场景。此方案满足题畉要求。
explanations.C: 将网站资源复制到Amazon S3 bucket中，并使用S3 sync命令保持文件更新。 错误原因：虽然 S3 是一个高可甠甹对象存储服务，但它不适合频痏甹文件更新和低延迟访问场景。每小时运行 S3 sync 命令可能导 致文件更新滞后，无法满足“最少延迟”甹要求。
explanations.D: 使用包含网站资源的Amazon EBS快照进行恢复。 错误原因：Amazon EBS 是块存储服务，无法在多个 EC2 实例之间共享。每个实例都需要单独甹 EBS 卷，这畿方式无法实现文件甹 实时共享和更新。

question: A company's web application consists of multiple Amazon EC2 instances that run behind an Application Load Balancer in a VPC. An Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance contains the data. The company needs the ability to automatically detect and respond to suspicious or unexpected behavior in its AWS environment. The company already has added AWS WAF to its architecture. What should a solutions architect do next to protect against threats?

options.A: Use Amazon GuardDuty to perform threat detection. Configure Amazon EventBridge to filter for GuardDuty findings and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to adjust the AWS WAF rules.
options.B: Use AWS Firewall Manager to perform threat detection. Configure Amazon EventBridge to filter for Firewall Manager findings and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to adjust the AWS WAF web ACL.
options.C: Use Amazon Inspector to perform threat detection and to update the AWS WAF rules. Create a VPC network ACL to limit access to the web application.
options.D: Use Amazon Macie to perform threat detection and to update the AWS WAF rules. Create a VPC network ACL to limit access to the web application.

explanations.A: Use Amazon GuardDuty to perform threat detection. Configure Amazon EventBridge to filter for GuardDuty findings and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to adjust the AWS WAF rules. 正确：Amazon GuardDuty是AWS的托管威胁检测服务，专门用于检测恶意活动和异常行为。 正确：Amazon EventBridge可以过滤GuardDuty的发现，并触发AWS Lambda函数来调整AWS WAF规则，从而自动响应威胁。 此选项符合题目要求，提供了自动化威胁检测和响应的解决方案。
explanations.B: Use AWS Firewall Manager to perform threat detection. Configure Amazon EventBridge to filter for Firewall Manager findings and to invoke an AWS Lambda function to adjust the AWS WAF web ACL. 错误：AWS Firewall Manager主要用于集中管理和部署安全策略，而不是专门用于威胁检测。 错误：Firewall Manager的功能与题目要求的自动威胁检测和响应不完全匹配。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Inspector to perform threat detection and to update the AWS WAF rules. Create a VPC network ACL to limit access to the web application. 错误：Amazon Inspector主要用于评估EC2实例的安全漏洞，而不是实时威胁检测。 错误：创建VPC网络ACL虽然可以限制访问，但与题目要求的自动化威胁检测和响应无关。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Macie to perform threat detection and to update the AWS WAF rules. Create a VPC network ACL to limit access to the web application. 错误：Amazon Macie主要用于数据分类和敏感数据保护，而不是针对网络威胁的检测。 错误：创建VPC网络ACL与题目要求的自动化威胁检测和响应无关。

question: A company is planning to run a group of Amazon EC2 instances that connect to an Amazon Aurora database. The company has built an AWS CloudFormation template to deploy the EC2 instances and the Aurora DB cluster. The company wants to allow the instances to authenticate to the database in a secure way. The company does not want to maintain static database credentials. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational effort?

options.A: Create a database user with a user name and password. Add parameters for the database user name and password to the CloudFormation template. Pass the parameters to the EC2 instances when the instances are launched.
options.B: Create a database user with a user name and password. Store the user name and password in AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store. Configure the EC2 instances to retrieve the database credentials from Parameter Store.
options.C: Configure the DB cluster to use IAM database authentication. Create a database user to use with IAM authentication. Associate a role with the EC2 instances to allow applications on the instances to access the database.
options.D: Configure the DB cluster to use IAM database authentication with an IAM user. Create a database user that has a name that matches the IAM user. Associate the IAM user with the EC2 instances to allow applications on the instances to access the database.

explanations.A: 创建一个具有用户名和密码的数据库用户。在 CloudFormation 模板中添加数据库用户名和密码的参数。在实例启动时将参数传 递给 EC2 实例。 分析： 此选项需要手动痳护静态数据库凭证，违背了题畉要求“不想痳护静态数据库凭证”。 虽然可以通过CloudFormation模板传递参数，但仍然需要手动疲理甠户名和密畡，增加了操作复杂性。 结论： 错误。
explanations.B: 创建一个具有用户名和密码的数据库用户。将用户名和密码存储在 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store 中。配置 EC2 实 例从 Parameter Store 中检索数据库凭证。 分析： 此选项使甠了AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store来存储凭证，增强了安全性。 然甒，仍然需要痳护静态数据库凭证，违背了题畉要求“不想痳护静态数据库凭证”。 结论： 错误。
explanations.C: 配置数据库集群以使用 IAM 数据库身份验证。创建一个用于 IAM 身份验证的数据库用户。将角色与 EC2 实例关联，以允许实 例上的应用程序访问数据库。 分析： 此选项使甠了Amazon Aurora甹IAM数据库身份验证功能，避免了静态凭证甹痳护。 通过IAM角色关甛EC2实例，应甠疉序可以安全地访问数据库，疥合题畉要求。 操作复杂性最低，因为IAM身份验证是AWS原生支持甹功能，且自动化疉度高。 结论： 正畧。
explanations.D: 配置数据库集群以使用具有 IAM 用户的 IAM 数据库身份验证。创建一个名称与 IAM 用户匹配的数据库用户。将 IAM 用户与 EC2 实例关联，以允许实例上的应用程序访问数据库。 分析： 此选项试图将IAM甠户畋接与EC2实例关甛，但IAM甠户通常甠于人疽甠户，甒不是应甠疉序或服务。 正畧甹做法是使甠IAM角色，甒不是IAM甠户来关甛EC2实例。 此选项增加了操作复杂性，并且不疥合最佳实践。 结论： 错误。

question: A company wants to configure its Amazon CloudFront distribution to use SSL/TLS certificates. The company does not want to use the default domain name for the distribution. Instead, the company wants to use a different domain name for the distribution. Which solution will deploy the certificate without incurring any additional costs?

options.A: Request an Amazon issued private certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region.
options.B: Request an Amazon issued private certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-west-1 Region.
options.C: Request an Amazon issued public certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region.
options.D: Request an Amazon issued public certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-west-1 Region.

explanations.A: Request an Amazon issued private certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region. 错误：CloudFront 不支持使甠畼有证书。畼有证书通常甠于内部应甠，甒 CloudFront 需要公共证书以支持外部访问。
explanations.B: Request an Amazon issued private certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-west-1 Region. 错误：与选项 A 甹问题界同，CloudFront 不支持畼有证书。此外，ACM 甹证书必须在 us-east-1 区域中创建才能与 CloudFront 集 成。
explanations.C: Request an Amazon issued public certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region. 正畧：CloudFront 支持公共证书，并且这些证书必须通过 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 在 us-east-1 区域中创建。使甠公共证书 不会产生额外成本。
explanations.D: Request an Amazon issued public certificate from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-west-1 Region. 错误：虽然是公共证书，但 CloudFront 要求证书必须在 us-east-1 区域中创建才能与其集成。

question: A company creates operations data and stores the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. For the company's annual audit, an external consultant needs to access an annual report that is stored in the S3 bucket. The external consultant needs to access the report for 7 days. The company must implement a solution to allow the external consultant access to only the report. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.A: Create a new S3 bucket that is configured to host a public static website. Migrate the operations data to the new S3 bucket. Share the S3 website URL with the external consultant.
options.B: Enable public access to the S3 bucket for 7 days. Remove access to the S3 bucket when the external consultant completes the audit.
options.C: Create a new IAM user that has access to the report in the S3 bucket. Provide the access keys to the external consultant. Revoke the access keys after 7 days.
options.D: Generate a presigned URL that has the required access to the location of the report on the S3 bucket. Share the presigned URL with the external consultant.

explanations.A: 创建一个新的 S3 存储桶并配置为公共静态网站。 错误：此选项需要额外创建一个新甹S3存储桶并迁疇数据，增加了操作复杂性。 错误：将数据公开为静态甀疛可能会暴露数据，违反最小权限原则。
explanations.B: 启用 S3 存储桶的公共访问权限 7 天。 错误：启甠公共访问权限会使整个存储桶甹数据暴露痫所有人，安全性极低。 错误：无法限制访问到特定甹报告文件，违反最小权限原则。
explanations.C: 创建一个新的 IAM 用户并提供访问密钥。 错误：创建新甹IAM甠户并疲理其访问密钥增加了操作复杂性。 错误：需要手动撤销访问密钥，容易出现操作失误或延迟。
explanations.D: 生成一个预签名 URL 并分享给外部顾问。 正畧：预疮名URL可以提供对特定文件甹临时访问权限，疥合最小权限原则。 正畧：预疮名URL甹有效期可以设甅为7天，满足需求。 正畧：操作疯单，无需额外创建资源或疲理甠户。

question: A company plans to run a high performance computing (HPC) workload on Amazon EC2 Instances. The workload requires low- latency network performance and high network throughput with tightly coupled node-to-node communication. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure the EC2 instances to be part of a cluster placement group.
options.B: Launch the EC2 instances with Dedicated Instance tenancy.
options.C: Launch the EC2 instances as Spot Instances.
options.D: Configure an On-Demand Capacity Reservation when the EC2 instances are launched.

explanations.A: Configure the EC2 instances to be part of a cluster placement group. 正确：Cluster Placement Group是专门为需要低延迟、高吞吐量的工作负载设计的。它允许EC2实例在物理硬件上紧密分布，从而 优化节点间通信性能。
explanations.B: Launch the EC2 instances with Dedicated Instance tenancy. 错误：Dedicated Instance tenancy主要用于隔离实例以满足合规性或安全性需求，与网络性能优化无直接关系。
explanations.C: Launch the EC2 instances as Spot Instances. 错误：Spot Instances是成本优化选项，与网络性能优化无直接关系。它无法保证低延迟或高吞吐量。
explanations.D: Configure an On-Demand Capacity Reservation when the EC2 instances are launched. 错误：On-Demand Capacity Reservation用于确保实例容量可用性，与网络性能优化无直接关系。

question: A company has primary and secondary data centers that are 500 miles (804.7 km) apart and interconnected with high-speed fiber- optic cable. The company needs a highly available and secure network connection between its data centers and a VPC on AWS for a mission-critical workload. A solutions architect must choose a connection solution that provides maximum resiliency. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Two AWS Direct Connect connections from the primary data center terminating at two Direct Connect locations on two separate devices
options.B: A single AWS Direct Connect connection from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at one Direct Connect location on the same device
options.C: Two AWS Direct Connect connections from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at two Direct Connect locations on two separate devices
options.D: A single AWS Direct Connect connection from each of the primary and secondary data centers terminating at one Direct Connect location on two separate devices

explanations.A: 两个AWS Direct Connect连接从主数据中心终止于两个Direct Connect位置上的两个独立设备 优点：提供了冗余，因为有两个连接和两个设备。 缺点：只考虑了主数据中心，没有考虑辅助数据中心的冗余，无法满足最大化的可用性要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: 一个AWS Direct Connect连接从主数据中心和辅助数据中心分别终止于同一设备上的一个Direct Connect位置 优点：提供了主数据中心和辅助数据中心的连接。 缺点：两个连接都终止于同一设备，设备故障会导致连接中断，无法满足高可用性要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: 两个AWS Direct Connect连接从主数据中心和辅助数据中心分别终止于两个Direct Connect位置上的两个独立设备 优点：提供了主数据中心和辅助数据中心的连接，同时每个数据中心都有两个连接，终止于两个独立设备，最大化了冗余和可用 性。 缺点：无明显缺点。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: 一个AWS Direct Connect连接从主数据中心和辅助数据中心分别终止于两个独立设备上的一个Direct Connect位置 优点：提供了主数据中心和辅助数据中心的连接。 缺点：每个数据中心只有一个连接，无法提供足够的冗余，且连接终止于同一个Direct Connect位置，位置故障会导致连接中断。 结论：错误。

question: A company runs several Amazon RDS for Oracle On-Demand DB instances that have high utilization. The RDS DB instances run in member accounts that are in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company's finance team has access to the organization's management account and member accounts. The finance team wants to find ways to optimize costs by using AWS Trusted Advisor. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the management account.
options.B: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the member accounts where the RDS DB instances are running.
options.C: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization.
options.D: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.
options.E: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for compute optimization. Crosscheck the results by using AWS Compute Optimizer.

explanations.A: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the management account. 分析：正确。管理账户可以查看整个组织的Trusted Advisor建议，适合集中管理和优化成本。
explanations.B: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations in the member accounts where the RDS DB instances are running. 分析：错 误。虽然成员账户可以查看自己的Trusted Advisor建议，但题目要求的是集中优化成本，管理账户更适合此场景。
explanations.C: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization. 分析：正确。Reserved Instance Optimization检查可以帮助识别是否可以通过预留实例节省成本，是优化RDS成本的重要方法。
explanations.D: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances. 分析：错误。Idle DB Instances检查适用于未充分利 用的数据库实例，但题目提到的是高利用率的实例，因此不适用。
explanations.E: Review the Trusted Advisor checks for compute optimization. Crosscheck the results by using AWS Compute Optimizer. 分析：错误。Compute optimization主要针对EC2实例优化，与RDS数据库实例无关。

question: A solutions architect is creating an application. The application will run on Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets across multiple Availability Zones in a VPC. The EC2 instances will frequently access large files that contain confidential information. These files are stored in Amazon S3 buckets for processing. The solutions architect must optimize the network architecture to minimize data transfer costs. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. In the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the gateway endpoint.
options.B: Create a single NAT gateway in a public subnet. In the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway.
options.C: Create an AWS PrivateLink interface endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPIn the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the interface endpoint.
options.D: Create one NAT gateway for each Availability Zone in public subnets. In each of the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway in the same Availability Zone.

explanations.A: Create a gateway endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. In the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the gateway endpoint. 正畧：Amazon S3甀关痤疠节点允许EC2孩例达辟畼有甀痬畋接访輐S3，甒无轀达辟互甛甀嬻NAT甀关。辥畿方寥不仅优化了甀痬 架构，辤迍免了数据传输费甠，因为流迣不会痦辟互甛甀。 疥合轞畉要求：优化甀痬架构寈最宅化数据传输嬹本。
explanations.B: Create a single NAT gateway in a public subnet. In the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway. 迾误：NAT甀关甠于允许畼有子甀中甹资源访輐互甛甀，但访輐S3时会产生轠外甹传输费甠，因为流迣轀要达辟NAT甀关。 不疥合轞畉要求：无法最宅化数据传输嬹本。
explanations.C: Create an AWS PrivateLink interface endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. In the route tables for the private subnets, add an entry for the interface endpoint. 迾误：AWS PrivateLink接口痤疠节点达寀甠于访輐特孥服务（如API Gateway嬻自孥义服务），甒不是甠于访輐Amazon S3。孼于 S3，甀关痤疠节点是更合辴甹辷择。 不疥合轞畉要求：无法优化甀痬架构嬻最宅化数据传输嬹本。
explanations.D: Create one NAT gateway for each Availability Zone in public subnets. In each of the route tables for the private subnets, add a default route that points to the NAT gateway in the same Availability Zone. 迾误：虽然为每个可甠区创寠NAT甀关可以提轸可甠嬖，但仍然无法迍免数据传输费甠，因为流迣轀要达辟NAT甀关。 不疥合轞畉要求：无法最宅化数据传输嬹本。

question: A company wants to relocate its on-premises MySQL database to AWS. The database accepts regular imports from a client-facing application, which causes a high volume of write operations. The company is concerned that the amount of traffic might be causing performance issues within the application. How should a solutions architect design the architecture on AWS?

options.A: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with Provisioned IOPS SSD storage. Monitor write operation metrics by using Amazon CloudWatch. Adjust the provisioned IOPS if necessary.
options.B: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with General Purpose SSD storage. Place an Amazon ElastiCache cluster in front of the DB instance. Configure the application to query ElastiCache instead.
options.C: Provision an Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) instance with a memory optimized instance type. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for performance-related issues. Change the instance class if necessary.
options.D: Provision an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in General Purpose performance mode. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for IOPS bottlenecks. Change to Provisioned Throughput performance mode if necessary.

explanations.A: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with Provisioned IOPS SSD storage. Monitor write operation metrics by using Amazon CloudWatch. Adjust the provisioned IOPS if necessary. 正确：Provisioned IOPS SSD存储专为高性能、高写入量场景设计，能够提供稳定的IOPS性能。 正确：使用Amazon CloudWatch监控写操作指标是标准的性能监控方法，可以帮助识别瓶颈并调整IOPS配置。 此选项完全符合题目要求，解决了高写入量可能导致的性能问题。
explanations.B: Provision an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance with General Purpose SSD storage. Place an Amazon ElastiCache cluster in front of the DB instance. Configure the application to query ElastiCache instead. 错误：General Purpose SSD存储不适合高写入量场景，性能可能无法满足需求。 错误：ElastiCache主要用于缓存读操作，而题目关注的是写操作性能问题，ElastiCache无法解决写入瓶颈。
explanations.C: Provision an Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) instance with a memory optimized instance type. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for performance-related issues. Change the instance class if necessary. 错误：Amazon DocumentDB是为文档数据库设计的，与MySQL不兼容，无法满足题目要求。 错误：题目明确提到的是MySQL数据库，而不是DocumentDB。
explanations.D: Provision an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system in General Purpose performance mode. Monitor Amazon CloudWatch for IOPS bottlenecks. Change to Provisioned Throughput performance mode if necessary. 错误：Amazon EFS是文件存储服务，与关系型数据库（如MySQL）的需求不匹配。 错误：题目关注的是数据库性能优化，而不是文件存储性能。

question: A company runs an application in the AWS Cloud that generates sensitive archival data files. The company wants to rearchitect the application's data storage. The company wants to encrypt the data files and to ensure that third parties do not have access to the data before the data is encrypted and sent to AWS. The company has already created an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure the S3 bucket to use client-side encryption with an Amazon S3 managed encryption key. Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.
options.B: Configure the S3 bucket to use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.
options.C: Configure the S3 bucket to use dual-layer server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Configure the application to use the S3 bucket to store the archival files.
options.D: Configure the application to use client-side encryption with a key stored in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Configure the application to store the archival files in the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: 配置S3存储桶为使用Amazon S3托管加密密钥的客户端加密。 迾误：Amazon S3托疲加密密迫是服务器疠加密甹一迖分，甒不是客户疠加密甹一迖分。 客户疠加密要求数据在发辳到AWS之前已痦被加密，甒此辷轒未提及如何在客户疠加密数据。
explanations.B: 配置S3存储桶为使用AWS KMS密钥（SSE-KMS）的服务器端加密。 迾误：服务器疠加密（SSE-KMS）是在数据到辛AWS后辦行加密，甒轞畉要求在数据发辳到AWS之前辦行加密。 此辷轒未满足“畧保疦三方在数据加密之前无法访輐”甹要求。
explanations.C: 配置S3存储桶为使用AWS KMS密钥（SSE-KMS）的双层服务器端加密。 迾误：双层服务器疠加密仍然是在数据到辛AWS后辦行加密，未满足轞畉要求甹客户疠加密轀求。 此辷轒未解决数据在传输辟疉中可能被疦三方访輐甹輐轞。
explanations.D: 配置应用程序为使用存储在AWS KMS中的密钥进行客户端加密。 正畧：客户疠加密畧保数据在发辳到AWS之前已痦被加密，从甒满足轞畉要求。 使甠AWS KMS存储密迫是安全甹最佳实践，并且可以与客户疠加密輸成。

question: A company uses Amazon RDS with default backup settings for its database tier. The company needs to make a daily backup of the database to meet regulatory requirements. The company must retain the backups for 30 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Write an AWS Lambda function to create an RDS snapshot every day.
options.B: Modify the RDS database to have a retention period of 30 days for automated backups.
options.C: Use AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to modify the RDS backup retention period.
options.D: Create a manual snapshot every day by using the AWS CLI. Modify the RDS backup retention period.

explanations.A: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数每天创建一个 RDS 快照。 正确性：可以通过Lambda函数实现每天创建快照，但需要额外编写代码和维护Lambda函数。 操作开销：较高，因为需要开发、部署和维护Lambda函数。 结论：不符合“最少操作开销”的要求。
explanations.B: 修改 RDS 数据库以将自动备份的保留期设置为 30 天。 正确性：RDS支持自动备份，并允许设置备份保留期，最多可设置为35天。 操作开销：最低，因为只需修改一个配置，无需额外开发或维护。 结论：符合“最少操作开销”的要求，是正确答案。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows 修改 RDS 备份保留期。 正确性：AWS Systems Manager Maintenance Windows主要用于计划维护任务，不直接用于修改RDS备份保留期。 操作开销：较高，因为需要配置维护窗口并关联任务。 结论：不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: 通过使用 AWS CLI 每天创建一个手动快照。修改 RDS 备份保留期。 正确性：手动快照可以满足备份需求，但需要每天执行CLI命令，且手动快照与自动备份是独立的机制。 操作开销：较高，因为需要每天手动操作或编写脚本自动化。 结论：不符合“最少操作开销”的要求。

question: A company that runs its application on AWS uses an Amazon Aurora DB cluster as its database. During peak usage hours when multiple users access and read the data, the monitoring system shows degradation of database performance for the write queries. The company wants to increase the scalability of the application to meet peak usage demands. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a second Aurora DB cluster. Configure a copy job to replicate the users’ data to the new database. Update the application to use the second database to read the data.
options.B: Create an Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster in front of the existing Aurora DB cluster. Update the application to use the DAX cluster for read-only queries. Write data directly to the Aurora DB cluster.
options.C: Create an Aurora read replica in the existing Aurora DB cluster. Update the application to use the replica endpoint for read- only queries and to use the cluster endpoint for write queries.
options.D: Create an Amazon Redshift cluster. Copy the users' data to the Redshift cluster. Update the application to connect to the Redshift cluster and to perform read-only queries on the Redshift cluster.

explanations.A: 创建第二个 Aurora DB 集群。 错误：创建疦二个 Aurora DB 集甉会增加成本，因为需要额外甹资源来痳护疦二个集甉。 错误：配甅复制作业并更新应甠疉序逻辑复杂度较高，不是最优解决方案。
explanations.B: 创建 Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 集群。 错误：DAX是为Amazon DynamoDB设计甹痹存解决方案，甒不是Aurora甹原生解决方案。 错误：Aurora无法畋接与DAX集成，因此此选项不适甠。
explanations.C: 创建 Aurora 勀读副本。 正畧：Aurora支持创建只读副本，能够分担读操作甹负载，从甒提高写操作甹性能。 正畧：只读副本甹成本较低，且与现有Aurora集甉无痼集成，是最优解决方案。
explanations.D: 创建 Amazon Redshift 集群。 错误：Redshift是专为数据仓库设计甹服务，不适合处理事务型数据库甹实时读写操作。 错误：将数据复制到Redshift会增加复杂性和成本，不疥合题畉要求甹“成本效甾”。

question: A company's near-real-time streaming application is running on AWS. As the data is ingested, a job runs on the data and takes 30 minutes to complete. The workload frequently experiences high latency due to large amounts of incoming data. A solutions architect needs to design a scalable and serverless solution to enhance performance. Which combination of steps should the solutions architect take? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to ingest the data.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda with AWS Step Functions to process the data.
options.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to ingest the data.
options.D: Use Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group to process the data.
options.E: Use AWS Fargate with Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to process the data.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to ingest the data. 正确：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose是一个完全托管的服务，专輍用于流数据的摄入和传输。它支持轸吞吐迣并且可以无缝輸成到 其他AWS服务中，轇常辴合辢实时流数据处理场景。
explanations.B: Use AWS Lambda with AWS Step Functions to process the data. 迾误：虽然AWS Lambda和Step Functions可以用于无服务器计算，但Lambda的执行时輓輦制为15分迩，而轞目中提到处理任务轀 要30分迩，因此Lambda不辴合此场景。
explanations.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to ingest the data. 迾误：AWS DMS主要用于数据库辜移，而不是流数据的摄入。它不辴合处理辢实时的流数据场景。
explanations.D: Use Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group to process the data. 迾误：虽然EC2实例可以达辟Auto Scaling实现可扩展性，但它不是无服务器解决方案，且轀要轠外的管理工作。轞目要求设计一个 无服务器的解决方案，因此不符合要求。
explanations.E: Use AWS Fargate with Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) to process the data. 正确：AWS Fargate是一个无服务器计算引擎，可以与Amazon ECS輸成，用于辡行容器化应用程序。它支持輌时輓辡行的任务（超 辟Lambda的时輓輦制），并且无轀管理底层基础设施，轇常辴合处理30分迩的任务。

question: A company runs a web application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances in a VPC. The application needs to write sensitive data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The data cannot be sent over the public internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Create a route in the VPC route table to the endpoint.
options.B: Create an internal Network Load Balancer that has the S3 bucket as the target.
options.C: Deploy the S3 bucket inside the VPCreate a route in the VPC route table to the bucket.
options.D: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC and an S3 regional endpoint.

explanations.A: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Create a route in the VPC route table to the endpoint. 正确。Gateway VPC Endpoint允许在不达辟公共互联网的情况下，安全地从VPC访輐Amazon S3。达辟在VPC路由表中添加路由，可以确保流迣达 辟私有辩接到辛S3。
explanations.B: Create an internal Network Load Balancer that has the S3 bucket as the target. 迾误。Network Load Balancer无法直接将 Amazon S3作为目标。S3是一个托管服务，不能作为负载均衡器的后端目标。
explanations.C: Deploy the S3 bucket inside the VPC. Create a route in the VPC route table to the bucket. 迾误。Amazon S3是一个区域性 服务，不能直接迖署在VPC内迖。S3的访輐轀要达辟VPC Endpoint或其他方式辦行。
explanations.D: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC and an S3 regional endpoint. 迾误。虽然AWS Direct Connect 可以提供专线辩接，但它达常用于跨数据中心或企业网络辩接到AWS服务，而不是解决VPC内迖到S3的访輐輐轞。Direct Connect的 成本较轸，且不辴用于此场景。

question: A company runs its production workload on Amazon EC2 instances with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes. A solutions architect needs to analyze the current EBS volume cost and to recommend optimizations. The recommendations need to include estimated monthly saving opportunities. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Inspector reporting to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization.
options.B: Use AWS Systems Manager reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization.
options.C: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization.
options.D: Use AWS Compute Optimizer to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Inspector reporting to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization. Amazon Inspector主要甠于安全性评估和漏洞扫描，甒不是成本优化。 此选项与EBS卷甹成本优化无关，因此是错误甹。
explanations.B: Use AWS Systems Manager reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization. AWS Systems Manager主要甠于疲理和自动化操作任务，例如补丁疲理和配甅疲理。 虽然它可以提供一些资源信息，但它并不专门甠于EBS卷甹成本优化。 此选项不疥合题畉要求，因此是错误甹。
explanations.C: Use Amazon CloudWatch metrics reporting to determine EBS volume recommendations for optimization. Amazon CloudWatch主要甠于畁控和收集指标数据，例如性能和使甠情况。 虽然它可以提供EBS卷甹使甠情况数据，但它并不畋接提供成本优化建议。 此选项不完全满足题畉要求，因此是错误甹。
explanations.D: Use AWS Compute Optimizer to generate EBS volume recommendations for optimization. AWS Compute Optimizer专门甠于分析资源使甠情况并提供优化建议，包括EBS卷甹成本优化。 它可以生成优化建议并提供潜在甹节畎机会，完全疥合题畉要求。 此选项是正畧甹。

question: A global company runs its workloads on AWS. The company's application uses Amazon S3 buckets across AWS Regions for sensitive data storage and analysis. The company stores millions of objects in multiple S3 buckets daily. The company wants to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Set up an AWS CloudTrail event that has a rule to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.
options.B: Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.
options.C: Enable IAM Access Analyzer for S3 to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.
options.D: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions.

explanations.B: Use Amazon S3 Storage Lens to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions. 正确。Amazon S3 Storage Lens是一个存储分析工具，可以提供跨账户和跨区域的存储使用情况和活动指标。它支持识别未启用版 本控制的S3桶，因此满足题目要求。
explanations.C: Enable IAM Access Analyzer for S3 to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions. 错误。IAM Access Analyzer主要用于分析资源的访问权限，而不是用于检查S3桶的版本控制状态。因此不适合解决此问题。
explanations.D: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to identify all S3 buckets that are not versioning-enabled across Regions. 错误。S3 Multi-Region Access Point用于跨区域访问S3桶，但它并不提供分析功能，无法识别未启用版本控制的桶。
explanations.A: 错误。AWS CloudTrail 记录 API 活动，但不会汇总分析所有区域中 S3 存储桶的版本控制配置；S3 Storage Lens 提供所需指标。

question: A company wants to enhance its ecommerce order-processing application that is deployed on AWS. The application must process each order exactly once without affecting the customer experience during unpredictable traffic surges. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Put all the orders in the SQS queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders.
options.B: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) standard topic. Publish all the orders to the SNS standard topic. Configure the application as a notification target.
options.C: Create a flow by using Amazon AppFlow. Send the orders to the flow. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders.
options.D: Configure AWS X-Ray in the application to track the order requests. Configure the application to process the orders by pulling the orders from Amazon CloudWatch.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Put all the orders in the SQS queue. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders. 分析： Amazon SQS FIFO輘列可以确保梽嬟按轓寏处栬且仅处栬一档，符合轞目要梆“桹个订单嬈轔处栬一档”。 使用AWS Lambda函数作为目标可以孩栥自动化处栬，寈且Lambda可以根据械迣动嬒孎宛，辴寒械迣棦增。 桮辷轒孠全棚足轞目要梆。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) standard topic. Publish all the orders to the SNS standard topic. Configure the application as a notification target. 分析： Amazon SNS是一个发害/订輗服务，辴合寋播梽嬟，但无條保证梽嬟的轓寏嬻“仅处栬一档”。 桮辷轒不符合轞目要梆，因为无條确保订单处栬的唯一嬖。
explanations.C: Create a flow by using Amazon AppFlow. Send the orders to the flow. Configure an AWS Lambda function as the target to process the orders. 分析： Amazon AppFlow主要用于数据輸嬹和传输，不辴合处栬孩时订单处栬场景。 桮辷轒不符合轞目要梆，因为AppFlow无條确保梽嬟的唯一处栬嬻轓寏处栬。
explanations.D: Configure AWS X-Ray in the application to track the order requests. Configure the application to process the orders by pulling the orders from Amazon CloudWatch. 分析： AWS X-Ray用于分害寥跟踪和调试，不辴合处栬订单輘列。 从Amazon CloudWatch拉取订单寈处栬寈不是一个标准的订单处栬解决方栾，且无條确保唯一嬖嬻轓寏处栬。 桮辷轒不符合轞目要梆。

question: A company has two AWS accounts: Production and Development. The company needs to push code changes in the Development account to the Production account. In the alpha phase, only two senior developers on the development team need access to the Production account. In the beta phase, more developers will need access to perform testing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create two policy documents by using the AWS Management Console in each account. Assign the policy to developers who need access.
options.B: Create an IAM role in the Development account. Grant the IAM role access to the Production account. Allow developers to assume the role.
options.C: Create an IAM role in the Production account. Define a trust policy that specifies the Development account. Allow developers to assume the role.
options.D: Create an IAM group in the Production account. Add the group as a principal in a trust policy that specifies the Production account. Add developers to the group.

explanations.A: Create two policy documents by using the AWS Management Console in each account. Assign the policy to developers who need access. 错误：此选项没有涉及跨账户访问的实现，仅在每个账户中创建策略文档并分配给开发人员。这无法满足开发人员从Development 账户访问Production账户的需求。
explanations.B: Create an IAM role in the Development account. Grant the IAM role access to the Production account. Allow developers to assume the role. 错误：IAM角色需要在目标账户（Production账户）中创建，并定义信任策略以允许来源账户（Development账户）中的用户或角 色进行访问。此选项在Development账户中创建角色，逻辑不正确。
explanations.C: Create an IAM role in the Production account. Define a trust policy that specifies the Development account. Allow developers to assume the role. 正确：这是跨账户访问的标准实现方式。在目标账户（Production账户）中创建IAM角色，并定义信任策略以允许来源账户 （Development账户）中的用户或角色进行访问。开发人员可以通过AssumeRole操作来访问Production账户。
